STELLA FUGAZ · Prompts del Storyboard 233 clips · ≤15s · 21:9
·····························

Un prompt por página del storyboard, listo para Seedance 2.0. Cada clip dura ≤15s y arranca con la línea base de estilo (Satoshi Kon + Ghibli · 21:9 · 15s). Cuando una escena no cabía en 15s se partió en varias partes (1x1, 1x2…). Pulsa copiar y pega el prompt directo en el generador.

ACTO 1 · SEC 1-9 · Erdia cae · 76 clips

1 — ESCENA: Descenso al corazón muerto · *(clips 1x1–1x8)* 8 clips

CLIP 1x1The line of dawn13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; a luminous living world wrapped in soft golden cloud, continents veined with rivers of light, oceans catching the dawn like molten glass, breathing quietly against the black of space; here first only the void, then the planet's incandescent edge.
Shot/lenstwo chained wide space shots — pure black void, then a vast establishing of the planet's curved rim of light against the dark.
Cameraopen on a held, motionless black frame; then a slow reverent tilt as a blazing line of dawn cracks the darkness and reveals the planet's curve.
Lightabsolute darkness giving way to a single incandescent rim of warm gold along the terminator.
Actionhold on total black — the emptiness before the world, let it breathe in held silence; then, ma, a thin line of light splits the dark as the tilt lifts and the glowing golden edge of @Erdia rises into frame, calm and impossibly alive.
Moodsacred calm, awe, "before."
AudioSFX only — deep space hum, a faint high shimmering tone like a held chord. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x2Fall through the clouds15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; golden cloudbanks lit from within, then living mountain ranges below, snow-crests set alight by dawn, a world exhaling mist.
Shot/lenstwo chained wide aerials — a plunge through towering golden clouds, then a low sweep over living mountain ridges.
Cameraa descending crane that tips over the edge and drops through cathedral clouds, easing into a fast aerial glide over the peaks.
Lightwarm dawn blooming to full gold, volumetric rays stabbing through cloud towers, snow-crests catching fire with light.
Actionthe camera falls toward the world, parting golden clouds like curtains of light-dust; it breaks below into a gliding aerial over breathing mountain ranges, snow ridges glowing, the whole world inhaling and exhaling with quiet light.
Moodmajestic, descending, a held breath.
AudioSFX only — rising wind, the deep rush of atmosphere. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x3The dry fissure13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; breathing forests below, canopies rolling like green surf with mist rising between the trees, all warm gold — scarred by one long dry black fissure that does not belong.
Shot/lenstwo chained wides — an aerial over breathing forests, then a dolly-in that finds and locks onto the dark fissure.
Cameraa fast aerial glide over the living canopy that eases into a slow dolly-in toward the crack.
Lightwarm gold over the forests; a cold shadow pooling in the throat of the fissure as the camera nears.
Actionthe camera skims over forests breathing like green ocean swell, mist climbing the trunks; then — like an intruding thought — it finds a dry fracture in the crust, a scar no one healed, and pushes slowly toward its dark mouth, the warmth draining from frame.
Moodwonder curdling into unease.
AudioSFX only — wind, distant water and birds, a low ominous tone swelling as the crack appears. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x4Down the crack14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the interior of the fissure, sheer rock walls sliding from gold to grey, dead mineral veins, the daylight above shrinking to a thread.
Shot/lensa wide travelling descent between the rock walls, then a detail insert of the sliding stone texture.
Cameraa slow steady downward travelling into darkness, then tightening to a close travelling on the rock face.
Lightlight shifting from gold to grey to near-black, a thin thread of sky dying above.
Actionwe descend into the fissure, walls sliding upward past the lens as gold fades to grey and the world of light is left behind; hold close on the rock texture — grey veins turning black, a single thread of dust falling through the gloom.
Mooddread, sinking, claustrophobic.
AudioSFX only — echoing drips, deep groaning rock, the wind from above fading to silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x5Deeper8s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; deep inside the fissure, cold rock walls swallowed by advancing darkness, no daylight left.
Shot/lensa single wide travelling shot descending endlessly between the walls.
Cameraa continuous slow downward travelling, the darkness eating the frame.
Lightalmost none — the last dim glow climbing the walls and dying.
Actiondeeper, and deeper — the descent does not end; the darkness swallows the rock walls whole, let it breathe, the sense of falling with no floor beneath, ma held long enough to unsettle.
Mooddread, endless sinking.
AudioSFX only — deep groaning rock, faint distant drips, silence closing in. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x6The hollow heart10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the planet's core, a vast bottomless black cavern where a world's heart should beat — a cathedral of emptiness, dead and silent.
Shot/lensa wide dolly-out revealing the scale of the empty dead core.
Cameraa slow dolly-out opening the frame into the impossible void.
Lightalmost none — a last dim glow swallowed whole by the dark.
Actionthe camera pulls back and the cavern opens impossibly wide — the center of the world, where a heart should beat, hollow and dead; hold on the emptiness, let it breathe, the absence itself the subject.
Moodhollow, ominous, sacred dread.
AudioSFX only — a vast dead room tone, a low subsonic emptiness. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x7Held void9s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dead hollow core, near-total black, nothing beating within.
Shot/lensa single locked wide on the black void.
Camerafixed, motionless, held.
Lightnear-total darkness, a last faint ember dying.
Actionhold the black void — nothing beats, total silence, held silence, ma, sustain it until it aches; the dead heart of a living world, refusing to move.
Moodhollow, ominous.
AudioSFX only — one deep heartbeat that does NOT repeat, swallowed by silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 1x8Title: STELLA FUGAZ8s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Erdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; pure black, the void of the dead core, on which the title rises.
Shot/lensa locked wide on total black.
Camerafixed; the title fades up, holds alone, then fades away.
Lightnone but the soft glow of the title itself.
Actionover the held black, the title rises: STELLA FUGAZ; it holds alone, let it breathe, then dissolves back into the dark — a clean transition out of the prologue.
Moodsacred dread, threshold.
AudioSFX only — a faint low tone, silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no watermark. (Only the title card "STELLA FUGAZ" is allowed text.)

2 — ESCENA: Parque de la Luzagua · *(clips 2x1–2x9)* 9 clips

CLIP 2x1Cut to blue: Stella runs15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; a vast emerald park under a blazing open blue sky, a glowing luzagua river winding through the grass, wildflowers, ancient trees, drifting pollen like sparks.
Characters@StellaRopa — match her design, long white braid, freckles, civilian clothes exactly.
Shot/lenshard-cut wide of open blue sky, then a travelling wide following @StellaRopa running, then a detail pan along the luzagua river.
Cameraa jarring hard cut from the black core to a bright blue sky; a lateral travelling tracking her sprint; a slow pan following the river of light-water.
Lightdazzling blue-sky day, warm sun flaring between the trees, the luzagua underlighting the banks turquoise-gold.
ActionHARD CUT — from dead black to open blue sky as a peal of laughter shatters the silence like glass; @StellaRopa sprints barefoot across the grass, white braid snapping behind her, unstoppable; the camera pans to reveal a river of luzagua running beside her — water and light braided together — that people let pour freely through their open hands, never closing their fists. Let this last beat breathe.
Moodpure joy, freedom, utopian warmth.
AudioSFX only — bright laughter, running footsteps on grass, breeze, soft flowing light-water. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x2Gix ignites, Vera behind14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; sun-dappled grass beneath ancient trees, pollen hanging in warm shafts, a sunlit path where the river glints beyond.
Characters@StellaRopa; @Gix (luzagua-blue + warm gold light-axolotl); @VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes) — match her flowing gold-white naiel robes, long white hair partly bound. Props: @Brazalete.
Shot/lensclose-up on @StellaRopa's wrist and bright face, a whip-pan as @Gix ignites and flees, a full-body Steadicam of her chase, easing to a medium travelling on @VeraRopa.
Cameraclose on the wrist; a whip-pan chasing @Gix into the air; a Steadicam follow of Stella weaving through strollers; a gentle travelling settling on Vera walking unhurried behind.
Lightsunny; @Gix adds a dancing firefly glow that paints Stella's face; soft even daylight on Vera.
Action@StellaRopa taps the @Brazalete on her wrist, fingers brushing the warm metal; with a soft chime @Gix blooms out of the air — half spark, half mischief — and darts away; she chases it laughing, dodging people wandering through the light; behind them, in no hurry, @VeraRopa walks serene, watching her daughter run.
Moodplayful, tender, alive.
AudioSFX only — a soft bright chime as Gix ignites, Stella's delighted laugh, rustling leaves, park ambience. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x3"I'm the best" / the shadow falls11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; open sunlit lawn, wildflowers, the river glinting behind, ancient trees; a vast shadow beginning to fall.
Characters@VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes), @StellaRopa.
Shot/lensmedium Steadicam on @VeraRopa watching, an American shot (handheld) on @StellaRopa half-turned mid-run, then a wide full-body as she stops dead in a growing shadow.
Cameraa Steadicam holding Vera; a light handheld follow on Stella's grinning backward run; a locked wide as her small shadow sinks into a far greater one.
Lightwarm day, sun on the white braid — then the sun blotted out, a huge shadow swallowing Stella's own.
Action@VeraRopa watches her daughter run and calls ahead, fond and teasing; @StellaRopa runs backward a few steps, flashing a cocky sweet grin over her shoulder, all easy arrogance; then she skids to a stop as something enormous blots out the sun and her small shadow drowns in a far bigger one.
Dialogue
Moodyouthful confidence tipping into awe.
AudioSFX only — footsteps, breeze, a faint Gix chime, then a low swell as the shadow lands. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x4The flower-mecha14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; a clearing where the colossal @MechaFlores kneels forever, half-swallowed by blossoming vines, a war-machine turned garden, petals and dust in golden shafts.
Characters@StellaRopa. Props: @MechaFlores.
Shot/lensa low-angle tilt (contrapicado) up the towering @MechaFlores, then a detail pan across flowers climbing its rusted metal.
Cameraa slow tilt-up scaling the sleeping giant, then a lateral pan following a vine swaying in the breeze.
Lightthe sun hidden behind the mecha's bulk, god-rays spilling through its flowers, dust motes glittering.
Actionthe camera tilts up the colossal @MechaFlores — an ancient war-machine kneeling for eternity, armor cracked open with blossoms and vines, a sleeping giant; hold on it, let it breathe; then pan across flowers climbing the rusted plating, a single vine rocking gently in the wind.
Moodawe, the past sleeping under beauty.
AudioSFX only — wind moaning through hollow metal, rustling vines, birds nesting in the giant. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x5"Why did we stop?"14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; beneath the flower-choked @MechaFlores, its vast form filling the sky, warm golden-hour light, blossoms suspended in the air.
Characters@StellaRopa, @VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes). Props: @MechaFlores.
Shot/lensa wide with @StellaRopa tiny at the giant's foot, a medium on her looking up as she asks, a medium on @VeraRopa arriving and crouching.
Cameraa locked wide holding the scale; a fixed medium on Stella; a light handheld as Vera reaches her and lowers to her height.
Lightwarm golden hour, god-rays through the mecha's flowers.
Actionhold on @StellaRopa, tiny at the foot of the giant, craning her neck all the way up — the scale of a world that once was, let it breathe; still gazing upward she asks aloud; @VeraRopa catches up, her smile turning serious — this she means — and crouches to her daughter's height.
Dialogue
Moodwonder, innocence, the calm before tragedy.
AudioSFX only — soft breeze, distant luzagua, petals rustling. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x6"A person is a river"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; at the child's height in the mecha's warm shadow, then at the edge of the glowing luzagua river, light-water curling past open hands.
Characters@VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes), @StellaRopa.
Shot/lensa close-up on @VeraRopa choosing her words, a detail of her hand showing the luzagua running free through fingers, a close-up holding her gaze on Stella.
Cameraintimate fixed close-ups intercut with the river detail; a barely-there push into her face on the final line.
Lightwarm, with glowing turquoise-gold river light playing over both faces.
Action@VeraRopa, at her daughter's level, chooses her words carefully and speaks the weight under the legend; she scoops the luzagua and lets it stream back through open fingers, never closing her fist, showing the one law of their people; she holds Stella's gaze — a beat, ma — as the truth that won't yet fit in a child lands.
Dialogue
Moodthe thematic heart, gentle but heavy.
AudioSFX only — flowing luzagua, soft wind, a held breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x7She half-listens / Gix calls13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; the warm sunlit park, an ancient tree with @Gix blinking on a branch, mother and daughter close.
Characters@StellaRopa, @Gix, @VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaRopa nodding but distracted, a detail pan to @Gix on a branch, a close-up on @VeraRopa noticing.
Camerafixed close-ups; a gentle pan to Gix; back to Vera's fond, faintly sad face.
Lightwarm golden hour, lengthening shadows.
Action@StellaRopa nods very seriously… but her eyes already drift away — she is fourteen, she doesn't understand yet; @Gix flickers on a branch, playful, calling her; @VeraRopa notices, smiles with a touch of sadness, and lets her go. Hold on that fond smile, let it breathe.
Moodtender, foreboding, ordinary happiness.
AudioSFX only — breeze, a faint Gix chime, rustling leaves. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x8"Tell Selka I beat Gix"14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; the sunlit park path, @StellaRopa already a bright running shape against the green, the river glinting beyond.
Characters@VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes), @StellaRopa, @Gix.
Shot/lensa medium on @VeraRopa still crouched speaking softly, a full-body Steadicam of @StellaRopa running off and shouting over her shoulder, a wide of her shrinking into the green.
Cameraa fixed medium on Vera; a Steadicam catching Stella's running turn; a locked wide as she recedes.
Lightwarm golden hour, white braid catching the last sun.
Action@VeraRopa, still crouched, says softly that she's going for the baby; @StellaRopa, already running and chasing @Gix, twists her neck to shout back over her shoulder; then she dwindles away, white against the green, smaller and smaller.
Dialogue
Moodthe last good day — dramatic irony.
AudioSFX only — fading laughter, breeze, distant Gix chime. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 2x9The last good day15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ParqueLuzagua — match its architecture, materials, colors; the sunlit path, @VeraRopa held alone, the luzagua river flowing indifferent beside her in the gold.
Characters@VeraRopa (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensa slow dolly-in close-up on @VeraRopa watching her daughter go, then a detail hold on the luzagua river flowing on.
Cameraa slow dolly-in settling to near-static on Vera's face; a fixed detail on the moving light-water.
Lightwarm golden hour, soft on her face; the river glinting under the sun.
Actionthe camera stays with @VeraRopa watching — a mother watching her daughter on the last good day of her whole life, and only we know it; hold, let it breathe, ma; then the river of luzagua keeps flowing, indifferent, shining in the sun. Sustain the held silence.
Moodthe last good day — dramatic irony, tender dread.
AudioSFX only — fading laughter far off, soft wind, flowing luzagua. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

3 — ESCENA: Laboratorio de Naio · *(clips 3x1–3x15)* 15 clips

CLIP 3x1Stella enters laughing, laughter dies13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; Naio's lab, cool, clean, hushed, pale curved organic-tech surfaces, floating holographic data, clinical blue-white light, the warm world sealed outside.
Characters@StellaRopa, @Gix.
Shot/lensa wide of the door opening, a medium Steadicam following @StellaRopa in, a close-up as her smile drains.
Cameraa fixed wide on the door; a Steadicam step-in with her; a slow push to her face as the smile falls.
Lightwarm park light spilling in behind her, swallowed by the lab's cold blue-white.
Actionthe door opens and @StellaRopa strolls in still laughing, @Gix looping around her; she speaks lightly, the laugh still in her mouth — then it fades on its own, the smile falling; something in the air is wrong, and @Gix's glow dims and tucks behind her. Hold the sudden quiet.
Dialogue
Moodwarmth about to be extinguished.
AudioSFX only — door hiss, a fading laugh, a Gix chime, low lab hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x2Grim parents / "Everything okay?"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, a rotating data projection glowing behind the parents, a floating cradle to the side.
Characters@StellaRopa (POV); @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes) and @Naio, grave, underlit by the projection; @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes) asleep.
Shot/lensa wide POV of the grim parents before the projection, a detail of @SelkaBebe sleeping in the floating cradle, a close-up on @StellaRopa's small voice.
Cameraa fixed wide POV; a fixed detail on the baby breathing; a fixed close-up on Stella.
Lightcold blue-white, the projection underlighting Vera and Naio's faces; a hush of warmth by the cradle.
ActionStella's POV — @VeraArmadura and @Naio stand before a data projection, no one laughing, faces of people who saw something they cannot un-see; ma, hold; in a floating cradle @SelkaBebe sleeps, barely breathing; @StellaRopa, her smile entirely gone, asks in a small voice.
Dialogue
Moodthe floor dropping out.
AudioSFX only — low hum, holographic blips, a single soft warning tone. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x3"Put it on. Quickly."12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, a folded recon suit passing between father and daughter.
Characters@Naio, @StellaRopa transitioning into @StellaArmadura as she dons the suit.
Shot/lensa medium as @Naio silently holds out the folded suit, a close-up on his tense jaw, a full-body handheld of her pulling it on.
Cameraa fixed medium; a fixed close-up; a light handheld as she dresses, glancing at her parents.
Lightcool clinical, soft on their faces.
Actionno one answers her; the silence is heavy; @Naio wordlessly presses a folded recon suit into her hands; his jaw tight, he speaks clipped and low; @StellaRopa obeys without understanding, clumsily beginning to pull on the suit — becoming @StellaArmadura — searching her parents' eyes for reassurance that doesn't come.
Dialogue
Moodrising fear.
AudioSFX only — suit fasteners clicking, low hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x4"The King isn't protecting us"10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; close in the cold lab, shadows pooling, the hum of secrets.
Characters@Naio, @StellaArmadura.
Shot/lensa medium dolly-in on @Naio leaning close, a close-up on his half-shadowed face as he lands the truth.
Cameraa slow dolly-in tightening on Naio; a fixed close-up.
Lightcold, one side of his face in darkness.
Action@Naio steps close and lowers his voice like a man confessing something forbidden inside his own home, glancing toward the door; then, a beat, he speaks the impossible thing, every word costing him; @StellaArmadura's face begins to crumble.
Dialogue
Moodconspiratorial dread, devastating revelation.
AudioSFX only — quiet hum, his low voice, the faint dead heartbeat beneath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x5The projection / "That's not possible"12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, a holographic projection replaying the descent into @Erdia's dead hollow core.
Characters@Naio (implied), @StellaArmadura.
Shot/lensa wide dolly-in into the hologram of the dead core, a close-up on @StellaArmadura unable to believe it.
Cameraa slow dolly-in into the rotating projection; a fixed close-up on Stella.
Lightthe hologram's cold flickering blue glow.
Actionthe projection confirms it — the same plunge from the prologue, all the way down to the black hollow heart, @Erdia emptying from within; hold on it, clinical horror; @StellaArmadura stares, unable to believe, clinging to what she was taught.
Dialogue
Mooddawning horror.
AudioSFX only — holographic tones, a faint dead heartbeat beneath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x6"That's why he wants it" / the key burns in13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, a delicate naiel device unfolding over @StellaArmadura's open palm.
Characters@Naio, @StellaArmadura. Props: @LlaveDeLuz forming in her palm.
Shot/lensa close-up on @Naio, a detail of the device over her open hand, an insert of the sigil searing under the skin, a close-up as she grits her teeth.
Camerafixed close-ups and inserts; a light handheld as she braces against the pain.
Lightcool; the device's focused glow blooming across her palm as the @LlaveDeLuz burns in.
Action@Naio answers plainly — the thing that gives life is exactly what the King means to steal; he activates a machine over her open hand — she expects a jewel, an object — but instead of placing anything he prepares her: petals of light fold inward and a glowing key-sigil burns itself into the skin of her palm, a brief clean pain; @StellaArmadura grits her teeth, holding still, trusting him.
Dialogue
Moodritual, sacrifice, trust.
AudioSFX only — a rising tone, a soft searing sizzle, her sharp inhale. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x7"Only you could ever use it"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, the sigil's warm glow held between their hands, the world narrowed to a father's face and a daughter's eyes.
Characters@Naio, @StellaArmadura. Props: @LlaveDeLuz.
Shot/lensa medium of @Naio holding her marked hand, a detail as he closes her fingers over the sigil, a close-up dolly-in on his eyes as the weight lands.
Cameraa fixed medium; a fixed detail; a slow dolly-in on Naio's gaze.
Lightcool, with the warm sigil-glow pooling between their hands.
Action@Naio holds her newly-marked hand and closes her fingers gently over the glowing @LlaveDeLuz, folding her fist in both of his; he explains the bond less like science than a vow — the Orb is their blood, only their family can touch it, and once it is inside her, only she could ever use it; he holds her gaze without blinking, pressing the truth in like a seal, and her eyes widen at the size of it.
Dialogue
Moodsolemn, sacred, fateful.
AudioSFX only — quiet hum, his low voice, a held breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x8The baby cries / big-sister instinct14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab, a floating cradle a small pocket of softness amid the instruments.
Characters@StellaArmadura, @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaArmadura unable to process it, a detail of @SelkaBebe waking and crying, a full-body Steadicam as Stella crosses to her, a medium handheld as she leans over the cradle.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a fixed detail; a Steadicam follow; a light handheld cupping close.
Lightcool, softening to warmth near the cradle.
Action@StellaArmadura can't process it, her face searching for a handhold that won't come; in the cradle @SelkaBebe opens her eyes and breaks into a thin cry; without a thought Stella drops the weight of the moment and the big-sister instinct takes over — she goes straight to her little sister, leaning over the cradle and cupping her hand above the baby.
Moodtenderness amid dread.
AudioSFX only — baby crying, soft hurried footsteps, low hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x9THE LIGHT GAME (the seed)15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; over the cradle, the one warm light in the cold lab coming from a spark of @Gix.
Characters@StellaArmadura, @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @Gix.
Shot/lensan insert of a @Gix spark dancing in her cupped palm, a close-up two-shot of the sisters forehead to forehead, a detail of the baby's hand gripping Stella's finger.
Cameranearly still, barely breathing; a fixed insert, a fixed close-up, a fixed detail.
Lightwarm firefly glow from @Gix, the lab's cold blue pushed to the edges.
Actiona spark of @Gix drops into @StellaArmadura's cupped palm and dances like a captured firefly; she presses her forehead softly to the baby's and both sisters smile — a tiny, warm, sister moment; @SelkaBebe calms instantly, her little hand closing around Stella's finger. Hold this, warmly — this exact gesture is the seed that detonates at the climax; render it clearly. Let it breathe, ma.
Moodpure love, fragile, the heart of the film — dramatic irony.
AudioSFX only — a soft warm chime, the baby quieting, a small shared breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Cameraa fixed close-up; a fixed full-body of the huddle; a fixed wide on the door.
Lightcold around a small pocket of held warmth; then cold light flooding the threshold.

Cameraa slow low-angle dolly-in to his calm smile; a fixed medium; a close-up pan across the empty cradle and folded-suit clues.
Lighthe enters backlit, a silhouette resolving into that disarming smile.
Actionthe door opens and @Vorthan steps in with the easy warmth of a family friend dropping by, the faceless @RobotImperial units filling the frame behind him like shadow; almost fondly, savoring it, he greets @Naio; his eyes sweep the scene — the suit, the empty cradle — and understand everything.
Dialogue
Moodcharming menace.
AudioSFX only — door, heavy robot footfalls settling, his soft warm voice. No music.

Shot/lensa full-body Steadicam of mother and daughter easing toward the rear exit, an extreme close-up on @Vorthan's unblinking eyes, a full-body handheld as @Naio raises a force-field, a medium on the King's almost-pitying look.
Cameraa Steadicam slide; a fixed extreme close-up; a handheld on Naio's shield; a fixed medium on Vorthan.
Lightcold; the force-field's bright blue-white flash.
Action@VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura slip toward the back exit, slow, not running yet; the King's eyes catch it all, unblinking, and he gives the order; @Naio throws himself between them and snaps up a crackling force-field, buying three seconds; @Vorthan looks at him almost with pity.
Dialogue
Moodthe family shattering.
AudioSFX only — force-field hum, robot servos, his cold soft voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 3x15Naio struck down / "DAD!"8s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @Laboratorio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold lab erupting into motion, a force-field flaring and shattering.
Characters@Vorthan, @Naio, @StellaArmadura, @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensa full-body whip-pan as @Vorthan strikes @Naio down, a close-up handheld on @StellaArmadura's scream and reaching hand, a medium handheld as @VeraArmadura hauls her away.
Cameraa fast whip-pan of the strike; a handheld on Stella's cry; a handheld as they break into a run. This is an action beat — cut fast.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe force-field's bright flash, then the cold returning.
Action@Vorthan swats the shield apart and drops @Naio with a single pulse of light, as easily as pushing a branch aside — @Naio flies back against the console (no blood, no wound); @StellaArmadura lunges with a choked scream, hand outstretched toward her fallen father; @VeraArmadura tears her away by force and they run — the scene breaking into motion.
Dialogue
Moodthe family shattering.
AudioSFX only — force-field hum, a concussive thud, Stella's scream. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 4x1Flight down the corridor12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PasillosPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; tall ornate corridors of gold and pale stone, banners hanging still, everything strobed by pulsing red alert light and long thrown shadows — beauty turned to a trap.
Characters@VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes) carrying @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @StellaArmadura.
Shot/lensa full-body Steadicam of the two sprinting, a detail travelling of cold robot lights sweeping the walls behind, a medium handheld on @VeraArmadura speaking mid-run.
Cameraa fast Steadicam retreat ahead of them; a travelling on the pursuing lights; a handheld on Vera's face. Action beat — keep momentum, cut on movement.
Motionhigh motion strength, rapid handheld, motion blur, momentum.
Lightgold washed over with throbbing red, shadows sweeping past.
Action@VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura sprint down the grand corridor, @SelkaBebe clutched tight to Vera's chest; behind, far but closing, the hum of imperial robots and cold lights sweeping the walls; breathless, Vera turns her head and lays down the brutal law of the night.
Dialogue
Moodpanic, momentum, brutal love.
AudioSFX only — pounding footsteps, alarm, distant robot hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 4x2"Not me. Not your sister."15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PasillosPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the red-strobed corridor blurring past as they run.

Cameratight handheld tracking locked to their faces; a Steadicam on the smile.
Lightred alert wash sweeping over their faces, eyes shining wet.
Action@VeraArmadura glances at her daughter as they run and speaks the hardest truth of her life; @StellaArmadura runs on, eyes brimming, swallowing all of it; @VeraArmadura looks sideways at her and — in full flight — gives a mother's smile that has no business existing in this moment, and is stronger for it. Let that smile land, held a beat.
Dialogue
Moodheartbreak in motion.
AudioSFX only — breathless running, alarm, a ragged breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 4x3"Get to the ship" / robots breach15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PasillosPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; a branching of the grand corridor, red light and dust, a wall bursting open.
Characters@VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes) with @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @StellaArmadura, @RobotImperial units. Props: her light-strikes.
Shot/lensa medium handheld on @VeraArmadura, a wide whip-pan as a wall explodes and robots pour in, a detail of dust and debris hanging, a full-body handheld of Vera striking a robot down one-armed shielding the baby, an American whip-pan of @StellaArmadura deflecting and dodging, a detail of a robot cleaved by light.
Camerarapid handheld and whip-pans, cutting fast on every impact. Pure action — micro-cuts within the clip.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightred alert wash, robot light-beams slicing the dust, bursts of light-strikes.
Action@VeraArmadura, firm between gasps, tells Stella the plan; a wall bursts into dust and shards and the first @RobotImperial units pour through the gap; debris hangs suspended for an instant, pierced by a robot's light; @VeraArmadura fights one-armed, the other arm shielding @SelkaBebe, dropping a robot with a light-strike; @StellaArmadura moves with the agility of someone who trained her whole life for a test that wasn't this — deflecting, dodging, pushing forward; a robot falls cleaved by light, sparks flying, casing smoking. No blood, no gore, no firearms — all light-strikes.
Dialogue
Moodpanic, ferocity, love.
AudioSFX only — wall bursting, robot servos, light-strikes, alarm, footsteps. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Characters@VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes) with @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @StellaArmadura.

Cameraa Steadicam holding the pair back to back; a slow dolly-in toward the great doors. Ends on a held reveal.
Motionhigh motion strength for the fight, easing to a steadier reveal.
Lightred alert wash and smoke, then the warm pulsing glow of the Orb doors ahead.
Action@VeraArmadura and @StellaArmadura cut their way through the smoke, back to back, advancing; at the corridor's end the immense doors of @SalaDelOrbe rise, throbbing with light — the goal revealed; let this reveal breathe.
Moodgrim momentum, awe at the threshold.
AudioSFX only — footsteps, distant servos, a deep pulsing hum from the doors. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; a cathedral-scale chamber of pale luminous stone, its ceiling dissolving into golden haze, concentric naiel arches veined with living luzagua, a polished obsidian-gold floor mirroring the sphere, thin waterfalls of light down the columns, luminous pollen in god-rays.
Characters— . Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensa wide crane revealing the vast chamber with the @Orbe suspended at its center, then a detail hold on the sphere pulsing.
Cameraa slow grand crane through the hall to the sphere; a fixed detail on its surface.
Lightthe @Orbe casts a slow warm pulse of luzagua light across the whole chamber, god-rays and pollen glowing.
Actionan immense chamber; at its center, suspended, the @Orbe — a sphere of pure luzagua light, beating like a second heart of the world; the crane drifts in and holds; on its liquid surface slow waves of light travel, pulsing. Hold the heartbeat, let it breathe, ma.
Moodsacred awe, the treasure at the center.
AudioSFX only — a deep slow luminous pulse, a faint choral shimmer of tone, water-light. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Mooddread, the tide turning.

CLIP 5x7"That's why they always lose"13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the luminous hall, the King holding the girl by her hair, the fallen mother gathering her last strength.
Characters@Vorthan, @StellaArmadura, @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensa close-up on @Vorthan laughing softly as he holds her by the hair, an extreme close-up on his verdict, a medium of @VeraArmadura raising both hands toward her daughter.
Camerafixed close-up and extreme close-up on Vorthan; a fixed medium on Vera. Dialogue beat — measured, cold.
Lightwarm Orb-glow, cold on the King's smile, dim on the fallen mother.
Actionthe King, holding @StellaArmadura by the hair, laughs low, soft, almost paternal; a beat — the sentence, ma; on the floor @VeraArmadura gathers the last of what she has and lifts both hands toward her daughter.
Dialogue
Moodcruel intimacy, a mother's last act beginning.
AudioSFX only — a soft low laugh, a held breath, a faint rising tone. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 5x8The shield / the spear / "MOM!"10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the luminous hall, a shield of light forming around Stella, S1G1 behind Vera.
Characters@VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes), @StellaArmadura, @S1G1.
Shot/lensa full-body dolly-in as a light-shield weaves around @StellaArmadura from Vera's hands, a medium as @S1G1 runs a light-spear through Vera's heart, an extreme close-up on @StellaArmadura's shattering scream.
Cameraa dolly-in on the forming shield; a fixed medium on the strike; an extreme close-up on the scream. Action into a cracking close-up.
Motionhigh motion strength, impact frames, motion blur.
Lightthe warm shield-light around Stella; a piercing lance of light through Vera (no blood — the light passes through her).
Actiona shield of light forms around @StellaArmadura, woven by @VeraArmadura's hands — her love made a barrier; in that same instant, behind Vera, @S1G1 runs a spear of light through her heart — no blood, the light passes through her; @StellaArmadura's scream cracks in two.
Dialogue
Moodthe world breaking.
AudioSFX only — a shield chime forming, a sharp light-impact, a scream tearing. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Cameraa fixed close-up; a slow dolly-in to the mouth. Held silence into a near-voiceless line.
Lighther glow fading toward grey, the shield still warm around Stella.
Action@VeraArmadura looks at her daughter, holding the shield with the life running out of her, all of her poured into not letting go; hold, ma; her lips move one last time, almost without voice.

CLIP 5x10She cuts the braid15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the luminous hall, grief turning to survival, the light-blade flaring.
Characters@StellaArmadura (with braid) becoming @StellaPeloCorto (freshly-cut short hair), @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes, dying). Props: @CuchilloLaser.
Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaArmadura hanging, watching her mother die a meter away, a detail handheld as she draws the @CuchilloLaser and it ignites thin and blue, a detail whip-pan as she cuts the braid at the nape, a full-body handheld as she drops free and rolls up with short hair.
Cameraa held close-up of a child breaking; then handheld and a whip-pan for the cut and fall. Held grief into a fast action release.
Motionhigh motion strength for the cut and fall, impact frames.
Lightdim, the @CuchilloLaser's blade flaring thin and blue-white.
Actionheld by the hair, trapped, @StellaArmadura watches her mother die a meter away — a child's face breaking forever, hold, ma; then she pulls a @CuchilloLaser from her suit and the thin blue blade ignites; she brings it to the nape of her neck and severs the braid in one clean stroke; she drops free to the floor, rolling, short-haired now — from this instant she is @StellaPeloCorto.
Moodgrief turned to survival.
AudioSFX only — held silence, a light-blade snap, the braid parting, a soft fall. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Camerafixed, held.
Lightdim, cool, the last warmth gone.

6 — ESCENA: Toma el Orbe / huida · *(clips 6x1–6x6)* 6 clips

CLIP 6x1Take the Orb / launch to the duct15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the luminous hall, the @Orbe glowing at its pedestal, a narrow duct high in the ceiling haze.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto, @RobotImperial units. Props: @Orbe, @LlaveDeLuz, @MonitorMAX.
Shot/lensa full-body handheld of @StellaPeloCorto rising and running, a medium whip-pan dodging robots and vaulting a fallen casing, a detail dolly-in as her fingers close on the @Orbe, an insert as the palm-key ignites and the sphere shrinks into her hand, a detail of the @MonitorMAX reading MAX, a full-body tilt as thrusters fire and she launches to the duct.
Camerarapid handheld, whip-pans, dolly-in, tilt. Pure action — micro-cuts, momentum throughout.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
LightOrb-glow pulling her forward; a brilliant flare where the sphere meets the @LlaveDeLuz; thruster flare lighting the arches.
Action@StellaPeloCorto rolls up, broken inside, eyes flooded, but running for the @Orbe; she dodges one robot, then another, vaults a fallen casing; her fingers close on the @Orbe — at the exact instant of contact the @LlaveDeLuz in her palm ignites, the sphere collapses inward, shrinks, and pulses in her hand; on her wrist the @MonitorMAX floods and locks at MAX; her suit-thrusters roar and she launches straight up toward a narrow duct high in the ceiling — the only way out.
Mooddesperate drive, escape velocity.
AudioSFX only — running, servos, a bright ringing chime, a rising surge, thruster ignition. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text. (Only the device readout "MAX" is allowed.)
CLIP 6x2The last look / pursued into the duct14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; high near the ceiling duct, looking down over the hall, then into the narrow tunnel.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto, @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes, fallen), @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @S1G1.
Shot/lensa close-up as @StellaPeloCorto pauses to look down, a high-angle wide POV of her fallen mother and the crying baby below, a close-up as she grits her teeth and enters the duct, a detail travelling as @S1G1 fires its thrusters after her, inches from her boots.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a high-angle POV; a close-up; a travelling chase. Held grief into a fast pursuit.
Lightwarm Orb-glow below, cold pursuit light in the tunnel.
Actionfor a fraction of a second @StellaPeloCorto looks down; her POV — her mother lying still, @SelkaBebe crying beside the body, seen for the last time; hold, ma; she grits her teeth, swallows the scream, and enters the duct; @S1G1 fires its thrusters and chases her into the tunnel, gaining, centimeters from her boots.
Moodgrief and flight fused.
AudioSFX only — a held breath, a baby crying far below, thruster roar, rushing air. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 6x3S1G1 jams and explodes13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the narrow duct mouth and, below, the emptied hall with the fallen mother.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto, @S1G1, @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes, fallen), @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes). Props: @Orbe (in her hand).
Shot/lensa medium handheld as @S1G1 jams in the duct, a wide whip-pan as it explodes and hurls @StellaPeloCorto out into open sky, a detail of settling smoking debris, a wide crane down into the hall on @VeraArmadura fallen and the crying baby.
Camerahandheld, whip-pan, then a slow crane down. Action bursting into a held contemplative fall.
Motionvery high motion strength for the jam and blast, impact frames, motion blur; easing to a steadier crane.
Lightsparks and a light-blast, then a wide dim hall below.
Action@S1G1 jams in the duct mouth, wrenching, sparks flying everywhere; it EXPLODES, the shockwave spitting @StellaPeloCorto out the far side into open sky; hold on metal debris settling in the smoking duct, a single spark dying — the wake of impact; then a crane descends into the hall below: @VeraArmadura dead on the floor, the baby crying beside her, the vast emptiness all around. Let it breathe, ma.
Moodviolent release into hollow grief.
AudioSFX only — servos jamming, a concussive blast, debris settling, a distant baby cry. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 6x4Vorthan lifts the baby12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaDelOrbe — match its architecture, materials, colors; the emptied hall, the fallen mother, the King crossing to the baby.
Characters@Vorthan, @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes), @VeraArmadura (grey-blue eyes, fallen), @RobotImperial units.
Shot/lensa medium Steadicam as @Vorthan crosses unhurried and lifts @SelkaBebe, who quiets and stares at him, a full-body as two robots stoop for the body and he stops them with a curt gesture, a close-up on his cold line without looking at her.
Cameraa Steadicam to the cradle recess; a fixed full-body; a fixed close-up. Quiet, cruel, measured.
Lightdim, cool, the warmth gone from the hall.
Action@Vorthan crosses without hurry and lifts @SelkaBebe into his arms; the baby falls silent, staring up at him; two @RobotImperial units stoop to gather @VeraArmadura's body — the King stops them with one curt flick of his hand; he speaks coldly, not even looking at her.
Dialogue
Moodcold cruelty.
AudioSFX only — soft footsteps, a baby quieting, servos halting. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Lightdim, cool.

Cameraa slow grand crane pulling up and away. Hold the abandonment, let it breathe, ma.

7 — ESCENA: Cielo / naves aliadas · *(clips 7x1–7x6)* 6 clips

CLIP 7x1To the ship / the fleet appears15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @CiudadDorada — match its architecture, materials, colors; the golden metropolis of honey-stone terraces and luzagua canals seen from above, palace towers, a still-blue sky, an imperial fleet rising on the golden horizon.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto. Naves: @NaveStella, @NaveImperial (fleet).
Shot/lensa wide crane as @StellaPeloCorto is flung from the palace onto the hidden @NaveStella, a detail handheld of trembling hands firing the controls, a wide of the @NaveImperial fleet on the horizon, a full-body Steadicam as she weaves between the towers.
Cameraa crane, a handheld cockpit detail, a fixed wide reveal, a Steadicam flight. Action beat, momentum building.
Motionhigh motion strength, rapid handheld, motion blur, momentum.
Lightgolden morning over the city, cold fleet silhouettes against the sun.
Action@StellaPeloCorto is spat out of the palace and drops onto the @NaveStella Vera hid among the towers; her trembling hands fire the controls and the cockpit wakes; the moment she lifts off, an @NaveImperial fleet appears on the golden horizon — dozens of ships, a threatening silhouette against the sun; the chase begins as she threads between the towers, flying like no one else, grazing the bridges.
Mooddesperate skill, dread on the horizon.
AudioSFX only — an impact landing, controls, engines waking, distant fleet drone, rushing air. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 7x2Chase / allied ships appear13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @CiudadDorada — match its architecture, materials, colors; the golden towers and bridges of the metropolis, bursts of light between them, the open sky beyond.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto. Naves: @NaveImperial (pursuers), @NaveAliada (rescuers).
Shot/lensa wide whip-pan as she slams two pursuers into buildings, a close-up handheld of her piloting brilliant and desperate, a detail as an @NaveImperial locks its sights on her, a wide whip-pan as that ship bursts from a side-hit not hers, a wide crane as @NaveAliada ships appear and open a corridor in the sky.
Camerawhip-pans, handheld, a crane. Pure aerial action — cut on impacts.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight.
Lightgolden towers, bursts of light between buildings, worn allied hulls catching the sun.
Action@StellaPeloCorto slams two pursuers into the golden towers, bursts of light between the buildings; she pilots, brilliant and desperate at once — but they are too many; an @NaveImperial frames her in its sights, about to fire — then that ship bursts, blown from the side by a shot that wasn't hers; other ships appear — @NaveAliada — allies, people who knew, cutting in, opening fire, carving her a corridor through the sky.
Mooddesperation and sudden rescue.
AudioSFX only — engines, impacts, light-bursts, an allied volley. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @CiudadDorada — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cockpit of @NaveStella over the golden city, an allied ship sacrificing itself in the background.

Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaPeloCorto listening to the radio without understanding, a detail of the crackling radio speaker as a woman's calm voice speaks, a wide whip-pan as an @NaveAliada rams an @NaveImperial fighter in the background.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a fixed detail; a whip-pan sacrifice. Dialogue over action.
Lightcockpit glow on her face, a burst of light far behind.
Action@StellaPeloCorto listens to the radio, not understanding; the speaker crackles — a woman's voice, calm as someone who has already chosen to die; behind, another @NaveAliada sacrifices itself, smashing into an imperial fighter.
Dialogue
Moodgrief, resolve, sacrifice.
AudioSFX only — radio static and a calm voice, engines, a distant impact. No music.

Lightcockpit glow, the gold of the city giving way to the black beyond.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @CiudadDorada — match its architecture, materials, colors; the high sky at the city's edge, allied ships blooming into light, three forced down intact.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto; @Piloto1 (radio); @Piloto2 and @Piloto3 (among the captured, distinct looks, NOT white hair). Naves: @NaveAliada, @NaveImperial.
Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaPeloCorto listening, tears falling, unable to answer, a wide whip-pan as @NaveAliada ships interpose and burst into flowers of light, a detail as three allied ships are forced down intact and their pilots taken alive.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a whip-pan of sacrifices; a fixed detail of the captures. Emotional action.
Motionhigh motion strength for the bursts, impact frames.
Lightblooms of light opening across the sky; three ships dragged down, not destroyed.
Action@StellaPeloCorto listens, tears falling, unable to reply; one by one @NaveAliada ships throw themselves in and burst — flowers of light opening in the sky — most dying for her; three allied ships go down without exploding, forced not destroyed, and the imperial fleet takes their three pilots alive.
Dialogue
Moodoverwhelming sacrifice.
AudioSFX only — a quiet radio line, bursts of light, engines straining. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the edge of atmosphere giving to the silent void of space, the golden sick planet falling behind.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto; @Piloto2, @Piloto3 (captured, glimpsed).
Shot/lensa close-up on @StellaPeloCorto watching it all in the rear mirror — the dying and the three taken prisoner — her face storing it, a wide dolly-out as she flies out into the void, alone, @Erdia shrinking behind.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a slow dolly-out into space. Held silence into the void.
Lightthe last golden glow of atmosphere, then cold starfield.
Action@StellaPeloCorto sees it all in her rear mirror — those who die, and the three carried off as prisoners — her face storing every image; then she flies out, into the void, alone, golden @Erdia falling away behind her, smaller and smaller. Let it breathe, ma.
Moodloss, solitude, resolve.
AudioSFX only — engines fading to a thin hum, then the deep silence of space. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Lightthe sick golden planet against black; a soft amber warning glow in the dim cockpit.
Actiongolden and sick, @Erdia slowly shrinks behind the ship, smaller and smaller, hold; then a cockpit panel: a soft alarm lights, an amber glow blinking in the silence — the first sign of trouble.

CLIP 8x3Oxygen critical11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Lightthe red pulse of the warning; dim cold cockpit.

CLIP 8x4Her face, crying without sound10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim cockpit, her face the only subject.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto.
Shot/lensan extreme close-up dolly-in on @StellaPeloCorto's face, crying silently.
Cameraa slow dolly-in on her face. Held silence, devastating.
Lightfaint cockpit glow, the red alarm pulsing softly on her skin.
Actionher face — @StellaPeloCorto cries without a sound; she is fourteen, she just watched her mother and a host of strangers die, and now she is running out of air in the middle of nowhere; hold, ma, let it breathe.
Moodgrief, exhaustion, the end of hope.
AudioSFX only — very shallow breathing, a faint alarm, near silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 8x5The floating tear / looks at her hand15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim cockpit in zero gravity, a single tear adrift.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto.
Shot/lensa detail as a tear lifts from her cheek and floats in zero-g, a detail as the floating tear catches starlight and turns slowly, a close-up tilt as @StellaPeloCorto lowers her gaze to her hand.
Camerafixed details; a slow tilt down to her hand. Deeply contemplative — hold the 間.
Lightstarlight catching the drifting tear like a pearl; faint cockpit glow.
Actiona tear lifts from @StellaPeloCorto's cheek and floats, suspended in zero gravity — a pearl of water adrift; it catches the starlight, turning slowly, hold the 間 / ma; then she lowers her eyes and looks at her own hand.

AudioSFX only — near silence, a faint shimmering tone, soft breathing. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim cockpit, the palm-key glowing, the tablet console before her.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto. Props: @LlaveDeLuz, @Orbe (integrated).
Shot/lensa detail dolly-in on the @LlaveDeLuz in her palm with the @Orbe pulsing inside, warm and alive, an extreme close-up on her glassy eyes as a thought is born, a detail handheld as she lays her open palm on the console.
Cameraa dolly-in on the palm; a fixed extreme close-up; a handheld as she reaches. Contemplative into a quiet desperate act.
Lightthe warm living glow of the Orb under her skin, alien to the death around her.
Actionthe @LlaveDeLuz in her palm glows, the @Orbe pulsing inside, warm, alive, indifferent to the death around it; @StellaPeloCorto's glassy eyes fix on it — a thought being born out of desperation; in an act of pure desperation, not knowing what she does, she lays her open palm flat on the console.
Mooddesperation crystallizing into instinct.
AudioSFX only — a soft warm pulse from the Orb, a shallow breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim cockpit waking with light flowing from her hand.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto. Props: @Orbe (energy).
Shot/lensan insert as the Orb's energy begins to flow into the ship, a thread of light from her hand to the metal, a detail tilt as one panel lights, then another, then another in the gloom, a medium on @StellaPeloCorto watching, face lit by the waking panels.
Cameraa fixed insert; a tilt across waking panels; a fixed medium. Contemplative wonder.
Lighta thread of Orb-light spreading, panels igniting one by one in the dark.
Actionthe Orb's energy begins to flow into the ship — a thread of light running from her hand into the metal; a panel lights, then another, then another, each waking one by one in the gloom; @StellaPeloCorto watches, her face lit by the reviving panels, not understanding what she is doing. Let the reveal breathe.
Moodeerie wonder, power stirring.
AudioSFX only — a soft rising surge, panels powering on one by one. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 8x8Overload / HYPER-JUMP14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @EspacioErdia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cockpit overloading, then the void as the ship stretches into a line of light and vanishes.
Characters@StellaPeloCorto. Naves: @NaveStella. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensan insert handheld of a charge meter climbing into the red, a wide handheld as the whole system trembles and overloads, a close-up handheld as @StellaPeloCorto grips the seat wide-eyed, a wide whip-pan as @NaveStella hyper-jumps into a line of light, a wide as a burst of white swallows the frame.
Camerahandheld, whip-pan, then a white blowout. Pure action — accelerate, cut fast.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightintensifying overload light, then a total white flash.
Actionthe charge climbs, and climbs — a meter racing into the red, the light intensifying; the whole system begins to shake, to overload, to collapse, the cockpit vibrating, lights flashing; @StellaPeloCorto grips the seat, eyes wide, the roar swelling; @NaveStella makes a HYPER-JUMP, stretching into a line of light and vanishing from known space; a burst of white light swallows the screen — the ship torn out of its universe.
Moodterror, release, transcendence.
AudioSFX only — a rising overload whine, rattling cockpit, a thunderous jump, a white silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Shot/lensa locked wide of total white.
Camerafixed, held.
Lightpure white, featureless.
Actiontotal white — nothing more; hold the white, held silence, ma, just as the black was held at the beginning; a clean threshold out of Act 1's space.
Moodsuspended, transcendent, threshold.
AudioSFX only — a faint high held tone, silence. No music.

9 — ESCENA: Balcón real / discurso · *(clips 9x1–9x7)* 7 clips

CLIP 9x1The plaza / "We have been robbed"11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the great palace plaza beneath a still-blue sky, a vast sea of gathered people, terraces and banners, a high royal balcony — grand, public, about to curdle.
Characters@Vorthan. Naves: — .
Shot/lensa wide crane over the packed plaza with @Vorthan tiny on the royal balcony above the crowd, a medium dolly-in on @Vorthan speaking with perfect measured mourning.
Cameraa grand crane; a slow dolly-in on the King. Public, controlled dread.
Lighta bright still-blue sky, banners and honey-stone catching the sun.
Actionunder a still-blue sky, an immense plaza packed with people; @Vorthan stands on the royal balcony, tiny above the crowd; hold the scale; then he speaks in a voice of perfect, measured mourning.
Dialogue
Moodpublic grief, hidden menace.
AudioSFX only — a vast crowd murmur, a single amplified voice, banners in the wind. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 9x2"Our planet will die"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Characters@Vorthan; the crowd.
Shot/lensa close-up on @Vorthan letting the word fall, savoring the plaza's silence, a wide pan of horror rippling across the crowd — broken faces, hands over mouths, a medium on @Vorthan as the condemnation grows.
Cameraa fixed close-up; a wide pan across the crowd; a fixed medium. Measured, poisonous.
Lightbright sky, the crowd's faces stricken.
Action@Vorthan lets the word fall, savoring the plaza's silence, hold; a murmur of horror sweeps the crowd, faces undone, hands to mouths; the King presses on, the condemnation swelling.

Cameraa tilt across the cages; a fixed close-up on the lifted gaze. Held silence.
Lightbright unforgiving sky, hard shadows in the cages.
Actionbehind the King, displayed in cages, the three @Piloto1, @Piloto2 and @Piloto3 who saved Stella — imprisoned, defeated, heads bowed; hold; one of them lifts his gaze just barely toward the sky, toward where Stella disappeared. Silence, ma.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the balcony, the King turning the knife, the crowd hanging on every word.
Characters@Vorthan; the crowd.

Cameraa slow dolly-in; a fixed close-up. Cold, deliberate.
Lightbright sky, his face composed and cruel.
Action@Vorthan turns the knife; a beat, and he poisons the memory itself — painting the girl who was loved that morning as a thief who chose to keep everyone's light for herself.
Dialogue
Moodmanipulation, engineered hatred.
AudioSFX only — an amplified voice, a stirring crowd. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 9x5"Stella. Thief. Traitor."10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlazaPalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the balcony over a crowd turning to fury, a sea of raised fists.
Characters@Vorthan; the crowd.
Shot/lensan extreme close-up on @Vorthan delivering the final words like a sentence, a wide handheld of the crowd that would have loved her that morning now screaming her name in hatred, fists raised.
Cameraa fixed extreme close-up; a handheld wide of the surging crowd. Turns to action on the crowd.
Motionhigh motion strength on the crowd, a churning sea of raised fists.
Lightbright sky over an ugly, roiling crowd.
Action@Vorthan delivers the final words like a sentence; the crowd that would have adored her that morning begins to scream her name with hatred — a sea of raised fists.
Dialogue
Moodlove turned to hatred.
AudioSFX only — a hard measured voice, a roaring crowd, chanting turning to rage. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Characters@Vorthan, @SelkaBebe (grey-blue eyes); the crowd.
Shot/lensa medium on @Vorthan holding @SelkaBebe before the crowd as she stares uncomprehending, a close-up dolly-in as the King, almost imperceptibly, strokes the baby's head like a father.
Cameraa fixed medium; a slow dolly-in on the stroking hand. Held silence, quiet horror.
Lightbright sky, a soft warmth on the baby's face against the ugliness below.
Action@Vorthan holds @SelkaBebe before them all; the baby looks out at the raging plaza, understanding nothing; very slowly, almost unnoticed, the King strokes her head — like a father — horror disguised as tenderness. Hold, ma.
Moodintimate horror.
AudioSFX only — a distant roaring crowd, a baby's small sound, wind. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
