Cameraa fixed detail; a fixed wide snapping to black. Hold the image, then hard cut.
Lightbright sky and warmth on the tiny hand, then absolute black.
Action@SelkaBebe's little hand closes trustingly around @Vorthan's finger — hold the intolerable image, ma; then CUT TO BLACK — the blue sky and the roaring plaza snap out at once. End of Act 1.
Mooddread, dramatic irony, a door closing.
AudioSFX only — a roaring crowd cut instantly to silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

ACTO 2 · SEC 10-20 · exilio y traición · 86 clips

10 — ESCENA: La nave nodriza / "te recogí" · *(clips 10x1–10x7)* 7 clips

CLIP 10x1The silent bay14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; a vast, dark cargo bay of an ancient mothership; cold metal ribs arcing overhead like the bones of a dead whale, dim amber work-lights pooling in the gloom, hanging mechanical arms, drifting steam and deep shadow.
Shot/lensgran plano general of the cavernous bay, then a plano detalle of a single conduit.
Cameralocked-off wide, held; then a static insert. No cuts, let it breathe.
Lightlow amber pools swallowed by dark, faint reflections on wet metal.
Actionhold on the immense silent bay — mechanical arms hanging like ribs of a dead whale, steam and shadow (間/ma, held silence). Then a single metallic droplet gathers on a conduit, hangs, and falls — the only sound in the void; let it echo and breathe.
Moodalien, ominous, small.
AudioSFX only — deep hull groans, dripping metal, a low sub-hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x2Stella wakes14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold metal bay floor, @NaveStella's wrecked hull clamped in mechanical claws in the background, scrap and shadow around.
Shot/lensplano general of the broken ship in the claws → primer plano of Stella's sleeping face → plano medio as she wakes.
Cameratwo held static frames, then a jolt into handheld as she rises. Cut in on the wake.
Lightdim amber grading across her face.
Actionhold on @NaveStella's shattered hull gripped in mechanical claws like a caught animal (contemplative). Cut to @StellaPeloCorto's face on the floor, eyes shut, a single eyelid trembling (held silence). Then she jolts awake, pushing up onto one elbow, disoriented, breathing hard.
Mooddisoriented, waking dread.
AudioSFX only — hull hum, her sharp gasp, scraping metal. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x3The hand, the relief, the shadow15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; dim amber cargo bay, deep shadow at the far end. Props: @Orbe, @LlaveDeLuz.
Shot/lensinserto of her palm → primerísimo primer plano of her eyes → plano general with a slow paneo revealing a colossal shadow.
Cameratwo held static shots, then a slow pan across the dark. Single continuous feel.
Lightthe faint glow of the @Orbe under her skin lighting her palm and face; the far shadow unlit.
Actionbefore anything else @StellaPeloCorto checks her palm — the @LlaveDeLuz still etched there, the @Orbe pulsing faintly beneath the skin (held silence). Her eyes close in relief; she lets out the breath she was holding, breathing at last. Then a colossal shadow shifts far in the gloom — something enormous and slow is walking; hold on it.
Moodrelief undercut by dread.
AudioSFX only — a slow exhale, distant hull hum, a heavy far-off footfall. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x4"Did you save me?"14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; dim amber bay, her wrecked ship at her back.
Shot/lensplano entero of Stella backing up → plano medio → contrapicado as @Theron emerges.
Camerahandheld with her retreat, then settle into a low held frame on Theron's silhouette.
Lightamber on her; @Theron half into the light, ageless and still.
Action@StellaPeloCorto scrambles up on guard, backing until her spine hits her broken ship. Broken-voiced, she asks who he is and if he saved her. Then a vast shadow resolves into @Theron — tall, of another species, eyes that never blink, centuries worn into his face; hold his silhouette, let the silence weigh.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "Where am I? Who are you?" — @StellaPeloCorto: "Did you… did you save me?"
Mooddread, awe.
AudioSFX only — heavy slow steps, her frightened breath, hull hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x5"I picked you up"13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; dim amber bay, cold shadow on @Theron.
Shot/lensplano medio of Theron → primer plano of his unblinking eyes → plano medio dolly-in as he advances.
Cameratwo static holds, then a slow dolly-in tracking his approach, eyes fixed on her hand.
Lightamber, his eyes catching a cold pinlight.
Action@Theron stays motionless, not yet approaching. "I didn't save you. I picked you up." Hold on his unblinking eyes; the silence weighs before the last words: "There's a difference." Then he steps slowly toward @StellaPeloCorto, his gaze locked on her hand.
Dialogue@Theron: "I didn't save you. I picked you up." — @Theron: "There's a difference."
Moodcold, transactional.
AudioSFX only — hull hum, his low even voice, a slow footfall. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x6"What shines can be followed"14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; dim amber bay. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensinserto (Theron's POV on her palm) → primer plano of Theron → plano-contraplano to her eyes.
Cameraheld POV insert, then static reverses. Predatory stillness.
Lightthe @Orbe's glow pulsing under her skin, lighting both faces.
ActionTheron's POV on @StellaPeloCorto's palm — the @Orbe's light pulses beneath the skin. He studies the glow, almost hungry, reading her like a trail rather than a person. Then he lifts his eyes to hers.
Dialogue@Theron: "What you carry inside shines. Like nothing I've seen in a long, long time." — @Theron: "And what shines like that… can be followed."
Moodpredatory calm.
AudioSFX only — low hum, his measured voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 10x7She hides the light (she's bait)11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NaveNodriza — match its architecture, materials, colors; dim amber bay. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano of her face → plano detalle of the clenched fist.
Cameramicro push as she closes her hand, then a held static insert. Let it breathe.
Lightamber; the glow smothered as she clenches, a thread of light escaping her fingers.
Action@StellaPeloCorto closes her fist over the light and pulls it to her chest — understanding that to him she is not a rescued child (held silence). Hold on the clenched fist, a thin thread of light leaking between her fingers: she is a trail, she is bait.
Mooddawning fear, isolation.
AudioSFX only — a held breath, distant hull hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

11 — ESCENA: Maltrato / Vosk / Brog y Nima / la dilatación · *(clips 11x1–11x10)* 10 clips

CLIP 11x1The grimy corridors12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; cramped, grimy industrial corridors of the mothership, cold light, tangled pipes, a hard-bitten motley alien crew crossing through.
Shot/lensplano general travelling through the corridor → plano medio of a shove → inserto of a spilled plate.
Cameraslow track past hostile faces, then handheld with dismissive energy. Cut fast on the shove and the spill.
Lightharsh cold work-lights, deep shadows.
Action@StellaPeloCorto moves through the grimy corridors as hard-eyed crew cross past. A crewman shoves her aside; another ignores her deliberately. A passing hand knocks her food plate to the metal deck — the food scatters and rolls.
Moodunwelcome, out of place.
AudioSFX only — machinery, low alien murmurs, a clatter of the plate. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x2Vosk blocks her path15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the grimy corridor, harsh work-light.
Shot/lensprimer plano of the spilled food → plano entero low on @Vosk → plano detalle of his finger prodding → primer plano of Stella deciding.
Cameraheld on the food, then a push up to Vosk's sneer; static on the standoff.
Lightharsh; Vosk looms, hard shadows.
Action@StellaPeloCorto looks at the food on the deck without picking it up — hunger and pride (held silence). @Vosk — huge, scarred — steps into her path and looks her up and down, taunting. His thick finger prods her shoulder. She holds his gaze a beat, deciding.
Dialogue@Vosk: "The boss's pet. The bait that breathes." — @Vosk: "You know what happens to bait once the fish is hooked?"
Moodmenace, provocation.
AudioSFX only — his low voice, crew murmurs. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x3The brawl14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cramped corridor, bulkheads and lockers.
Shot/lensinserto (hand slap) → plano medio (Vosk grins, cocks his fist) → plano entero (clash) → plano detalle whip-pan (fist hits wall) → plano medio (pinned) → plano detalle (stone hand lands on Vosk).
Camerafast handheld and whip-pans through the scuffle, impact frames. Cut rapidly.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightharsh work-lights, sparks off metal.
Action@StellaPeloCorto smacks his prodding hand aside; @Vosk grins — exactly what he wanted — and cocks the first punch. They clash: she's fast and slippery, ducking and countering, but he's a wall. His fist slams the bulkhead beside her head, metal chipping. He pins her to the wall, forearm to her throat. Then a stone hand the size of an anvil drops onto @Vosk's shoulder.
Moodoutmatched, ignition.
AudioSFX only — a slap, grunts, body blows, metal clangs. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x4Brog steps in13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the corridor opening onto a cluttered workbench hold.
Shot/lenscontrapicado with a tilt up @Brog → plano medio (Vosk retreats) → plano general of the workshop.
Cameralow tilt up the rock giant, then static; settle wide on the shop. Let it breathe after the action.
LightBrog's bulk blocking the light; then a soft warm workbench glow, weld-sparks floating.
Action@Brog — a silent rock giant, cracked stone surface glowing faintly within — peels @Vosk off effortlessly and plants himself between them, saying nothing. @Vosk spits on the deck and withdraws, humiliated. Settle on the cluttered workshop: a bench of parts, weld-sparks drifting in the still air (contemplative hold).
Moodsudden calm, protection.
AudioSFX only — heavy stone footfall, Vosk's grunt, a distant hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x5Nima: "two ways to break"13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; a cluttered workbench corner, warm work-glow.
Shot/lensplano medio of @Nima (four hands busy) → primer plano as she looks up → plano detalle of the four hands returning to work.
Cameragentle, settling, static. The warmth arrives.
Lightwarm workbench glow on tools and skin.
Action@Nima — a mechanic with four arms — works all four hands at once without looking up, talking to the girl. At last she lifts her eyes to @StellaPeloCorto. Then the four hands drop back to the work, adjusting, welding.
Dialogue@Nima: "Don't mind Vosk. He barks so he won't think." — @Nima: "There are two ways to break, kid. The one that cries… and the one that fixes things at three in the morning." — @Nima: "Guess which one I am."
Moodthe first warmth, found family.
AudioSFX only — tools, a soft mechanical hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x6The quiet beat with Brog13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the workshop corner, soft warm pool of light.
Shot/lensplano entero (crane) of Stella sinking down → plano medio two-shot with @Brog.
Cameraslow crane settling on her, then a still held two-shot. Held silence, 間/ma.
Lightsoft warm pool, the shop cavernous around them.
Action@StellaPeloCorto slides to the floor, exhausted, cradling her hurt hand — small in the huge workshop (held silence). @Brog sits down beside her, a mountain next to a child; he doesn't comfort her, he just stays. Let it breathe.
Moodquiet, tender.
AudioSFX only — distant ship hum, a slow breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x7"I want to go home"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the workshop, @Theron in the doorway.
Shot/lensplano detalle (her hurt hand beside Brog's still stone hand) → plano general (Theron enters, stops at the threshold) → plano medio (Stella stands, urgent).
Cameraheld detail, static on Theron, then to her. Let the silence hold before she speaks.
Lightwarm shop glow, cold light framing Theron at the door.
Action@StellaPeloCorto's trembling hurt hand rests beside @Brog's immovable stone hand (contemplative hold). @Theron enters and stops at the threshold. She straightens, urgent, pleading to go back.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "I want to go back to my planet. My family's there. My father, my sister—"
Moodyearning, urgency.
AudioSFX only — a soft hum, her voice, Theron's quiet steps. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x8The 1:4 dilation10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the workshop, cold light on Theron.
Shot/lensplano-contraplano on Theron, unmoved → primer plano as he measures how to deliver the news.
Camerastatic reverses, slow and cold.
Lightcold, half-lighting his ageless face.
Action@Theron, unmoved, tells her the worst part flatly, watching how to land it.
Dialogue@Theron: "Your planet is no longer your most urgent problem." — @Theron: "Here, time doesn't run the same as in your world. One year of yours… is four back home."
Mooddread, a silent clock.
AudioSFX only — low hum, a held breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 11x9"…Four."15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the workshop, Theron turning to leave.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano (dolly-in) as it sinks in → primer plano (her thread of voice) → plano medio (Theron already leaving, back turned).
Cameraslow dolly-in on her face, then static. The silence opens beneath her.
Lightcold, her face slowly emptying.
Action@StellaPeloCorto's face slowly registers the size of it — the silence opening under her (held silence). A thread of voice: "…Four." @Theron, already turned to go, delivers the line over his shoulder.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "…Four." — @Theron: "Every day you lose here, you lose four back there. So don't lose them."
Mooddread, a silent clock.
AudioSFX only — low hum, a caught breath, his receding steps. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Shot/lensinserto of her open palm.
Camerastatic, held. 間/ma.
Lightthe @Orbe pulsing faintly in the dark.
Actionhold on @StellaPeloCorto's open palm — the @Orbe beats slowly — over her the invisible weight of a clock running four times too fast (held silence). Let it breathe.
Mooddread, the silent clock.
AudioSFX only — a slow pulse, distant hull hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the once-golden city greyed by fog and scaffolds, luzagua canals running thin and dull, mine chimneys smudging the sky where gardens used to be. (Title card ERDIA · AÑO 8 on black, no visible letters — implied by a hold on black.)
Shot/lenstransición on black → gran plano general (paneo) over the decaying city.
Camerahold on black, then a slow mournful pan over the rot. Let it breathe.
Lightgrey, smoke-filtered, the gold dying.
Actionhold on black (title beat). Then pan across Erdia eight years on — the warm gold gone grey, thin dull luzagua canals, machinery and smoke where gardens once grew (contemplative).
Mooddecay, loss.
AudioSFX only — distant machinery, wind, a thin sick hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; grey ruined city, smoke rising, ash falling.
Shot/lensplano general (tilt) of smoke against a dead sky → plano detalle of a dim luzagua canal.
Cameraslow tilt up the smoke, then a held static insert. Contemplative.
Lightgrey, ash drifting like dirty snow, the gold dying.
Actionsmoke climbs against a dulled sky, ash falling slow like dirty snow (contemplative). Then a thread of dim luzagua runs between rubble, barely glowing, dying — the planet's slow death in one image. Hold.
Moodquiet rot.
AudioSFX only — trickling water, wind, a thin sick hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 12x3The refuge / Marek11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @RefugioResistencia — match its architecture, materials, colors; a hidden refuge of gaunt naieli gathered by lamplight, low warm glow, worn faces.
Shot/lensplano general of the gathered resistance → plano medio of @Marek addressing them.
Camerastatic wide, then settle on Marek. Warm and low.
Lightlow warm lamplight, deep shadow.
Actionhold on gaunt naieli gathered around a single light, tired faces (contemplative). @Marek — warm, firm-voiced, the kind people follow — speaks to his people.
Dialogue@Marek: "The King says we're like this because of Stella. Because of a thief."
Moodfragile hope.
AudioSFX only — low voices, a crackling lamp. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 12x4"Did a fourteen-year-old empty a planet?"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @RefugioResistencia — match its architecture, materials, colors; the lamplit refuge, circle of listening faces.
Shot/lensprimer plano (dolly-in) of Marek scanning the faces → plano medio → plano general (paneo) of the nodding crowd.
Cameraslow dolly-in on Marek, static reverse, then a pan across the crowd. Steady.
Lightwarm lamplight, varied faces (not all white-haired).
Action@Marek moves his eyes over his people, planting the doubt that holds them together. Then pan across the refuge as the faces nod, a low murmur — he has given them a different enemy.
Dialogue@Marek: "But I ask you: did a fourteen-year-old girl empty a whole planet?" — @Marek: "Or did someone need us to hate someone so we wouldn't look at him?"
Moodquiet defiance.
AudioSFX only — his voice, low agreement, lamp crackle. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Lightshadow under the hood; a wisp of white hair catching lamplight.
Actionoff to one side, motionless, stands @VeraEncapuchada — face unseen, strong woman's hands (held silence). Detail: a strand of white hair escapes the hood and hangs in the gloom.
Moodmystery.

Shot/lenstransición (faint scrap match) → gran plano general (crane) over the scrap mountains.
Camerabrief transition, then a slow crane sweep over the wrecks. Contemplative.
Lightdusty, overcast, sickly light.
Actiona faint scrap-to-scrap match into a wide crane over the junk world — mountains of dead metal under a sick sky, dust hanging in the air (contemplative hold).
Mooddesolate, tense.
AudioSFX only — wind over metal, creaking wrecks. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 13x2The crew / the ambush14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaChatarra — match its architecture, materials, colors; among the dead hulls, oblique dusty light.
Shot/lensplano detalle of dust in a light-beam → plano entero (steadicam) of the crew advancing → plano general (whip-pan) as the ambush erupts.
Cameraheld detail, then steadicam with the crew, then a whip into chaos.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightoblique dusty beams, then flashes of light-fire crossing frame.
Actionmetallic dust drifts in a slanted light-beam — total stillness before violence (contemplative). @StellaPeloCorto, older and harder, advances through the wreckage with the crew; @Brog covers the rear, @Vosk up front. Then it goes wrong: local @CazadorRecompensas ambush, bursts of light-fire slashing across the frame.
Moodstillness shattering into danger.
AudioSFX only — wind, then shouts, energy fire, scrambling. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 13x3Hidden / eyes meet12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaChatarra — match its architecture, materials, colors; a narrow crevice between wrecks, dust haze.
Shot/lensplano medio (handheld) as she dives into a gap → primer plano of her holding still → plano-contraplano to @Vosk seeing her.
Camerahandheld into the crevice, then static holds; a snap between their eyes.
Lightshadow over her, dust haze over Vosk.
Action@StellaPeloCorto dives into a gap between metal sheets, out of the enemy's sight, holding her breath (accion into stillness). She presses to the metal, crouched, safe, breathing slow in shadow (held silence). Across the field, @Vosk spots her — their eyes meet and hold.
Mooddread, suspicion.
AudioSFX only — distant fight, her held breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 13x4The stone / the betrayal14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaChatarra — match its architecture, materials, colors; the crevice, dusty glare.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Vosk deciding → inserto (his hand takes a rock) → plano detalle (whip-pan) as it clangs beside her → plano medio (Vosk shouting) → primerísimo primer plano of Stella's betrayed eyes.
Cameraheld on his face, then fast whip on the clang and the shout, snap to her eyes.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightdusty, hard glare.
Action@Vosk's face decides something ugly — a thin smile. His hand closes on a rock. He hurls it to clang against the metal right beside her hiding spot, a deliberate tell. Then he points and bellows to the hunters. @StellaPeloCorto's eyes fly wide — betrayal, a single beat of disbelief.
Dialogue@Vosk: "There! The one with the glowing hand! She's worth a fortune!"
Moodbetrayal, fury.
AudioSFX only — a sharp metal clang, his shout, rushing feet. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 13x5The collar / Vosk falls too14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaChatarra — match its architecture, materials, colors; the ambush site, dust and glare. Props: @CollarControl.
Shot/lensplano general (handheld) of Stella fighting the swarm → plano detalle of the @CollarControl snapping shut → POV (handheld) of her dragged, seeing Vosk → plano medio (whip-pan) as a net drops on Vosk → plano entero of Vosk struggling.
Camerafast handheld through the swarm, snap on the collar, dragged POV, whip to the net.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightdusty glare.
Actionthe @CazadorRecompensas fall on the crevice; @StellaPeloCorto fights, strikes, spins — but they're too many. A @CollarControl snaps shut on her neck and her suit dies with a sputter. Dragged POV: the last thing she sees is @Vosk grinning, counting his reward — until a net drops over him from the flank; the hunters make no distinctions. He thrashes in the net, shouting.
Dialogue@Vosk: "No, no, wait — I handed her to you! I—!"
Moodgrim irony.
AudioSFX only — collar snap, power-down whine, a scuffle, Vosk's protest. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Shot/lensgran plano general (crane) as both are hauled away.
Cameraslow crane pulling wide. Let it breathe.
Lightdusty, dim.

Lightharsh spotlight on her, mob a blur above.
Actiona barker presents "the Orb thief, the sector's most wanted"; the stands roar. @StellaPeloCorto stands in the pit, @CollarControl on, turning, hunting an exit that doesn't exist (held silence). Detail: the collar's red light blinks on her neck, her suit dead. Then a gate grinds open on the far side — her opponent is shoved in.
Moodcornered.
AudioSFX only — a barker over a roaring crowd, a gate, chains. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 14x3Noah, and the freeze14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the spotlit pit, roaring mob.

Camerastatic on Noah, slow dolly-in on her, then a pan across raised fists.
Lightharsh spot; the crowd dropping out of focus around her.
Action@Noah is shoved in — a young human, battered, dark tousled hair and brown eyes, a raggedy blue scarf, a single armored pauldron on one shoulder, fingerless gloves, worn gear, an old light-blade; eyes that refuse to quit (held silence). @StellaPeloCorto freezes — he looks uncannily like her own people; the noise falls away for a beat. Then pan across the mob baying for blood, fists up, an animal roar.
Mooduncanny, off-balance.
AudioSFX only — a roaring crowd, then muffled quiet, her breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 14x4"I won't kill you"12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the pit, roar of the crowd.
Shot/lensplano medio (Noah on guard, Stella lowers her hands) → primer plano of Stella → plano-contraplano to Noah, wary.
Camerastatic reverses, steady standoff.
Lightharsh spot.
Action@Noah raises his light-blade on guard; @StellaPeloCorto does not — she lowers her hands (held silence). Steady, against the roar, she refuses. @Noah measures her, blade still up, distrustful.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "I won't kill you for them to clap." — @Noah: "…Is this a trap?"
Mooddefiance.
AudioSFX only — bloodthirsty crowd, her steady voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 14x5"An offer"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the pit, mob above.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Stella → primerísimo primer plano of Noah deciding → plano medio (he lowers the blade) → plano entero (handheld) as both turn on the guards.
Camerastatic reverses; the crowd roar drops under their silence; then handheld as they pivot.
Lightharsh spot.
Action@StellaPeloCorto holds his gaze, calm: "An offer." @Noah decides — the roar of the stands fades beneath the silence between them (held silence, 間/ma). He lowers the blade a fraction; something gives in him. Then @StellaPeloCorto and @Noah turn as one on the pit guards, backs to the crowd.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "An offer." — @Noah: "Then you'll have to help me get out of here."
Moodalliance forged.
AudioSFX only — quick words, the crowd, then a charge. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Lighta violent spark, then the @Orbe's white flare returning.
Action@StellaPeloCorto rips off the @CollarControl in a violent spark. The @Orbe reignites in her palm with a white flash — she's alive again. The pit becomes a breakout: she and @Noah charge the guards. Chaos.
Moodexplosive momentum.
AudioSFX only — collar snap, surge of light, brawl. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

15 — ESCENA: La fuga / salva a Vosk / el respeto de Theron · *(clips 15x1–15x7)* 7 clips

CLIP 15x1Back-to-back / Brog breaks in13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the pit and stands, an execution platform above, outer wall bursting.
Shot/lensplano medio (handheld) back-to-back fight → plano detalle (whip-pan) blade parry + light-push → plano general (handheld) as the wall bursts → contrapicado (tilt) Brog with a torn grate → plano general (paneo) up to the execution platform.
Camerafast handheld and whips, impact frames throughout.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightharsh, sparks; daylight blasting through the new breach.
Action@StellaPeloCorto and @Noah fight back-to-back, moving as one body. His light-blade deflects a strike; her palm shoves a guard back with light. The outer wall caves in — @Brog smashes through, @Nima behind; Theron sent for her. @Brog rips a whole grate loose and uses it as a shield, debris raining. Pan up to an execution platform above the pit — someone is about to be put to death.
Moodrescue, explosive.
AudioSFX only — brawl, wall shattering, Nima shouting, falling debris. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the execution platform over the chaotic pit.
Shot/lensplano medio of @Vosk kneeling → primer plano of Stella stopping dead → plano-contraplano (handheld) Noah yelling → primerísimo primer plano of her choice.
Camerastatic on Vosk, held on Stella freezing, handheld on Noah, static on her decision.
Lightharsh overhead on the platform; chaos and sparks below.
Actionon the platform, @Vosk on his knees, an energy device at his neck, marked for death (held silence). @StellaPeloCorto sees him — stops dead in the chaos. @Noah screams for her to go, tugging at her. She looks at Vosk, then at the exit — she chooses, and changes direction (held beat).
Dialogue@Noah: "Stella, let's go!"
Moodimpulsive grace.
AudioSFX only — a charging device, jeers, Noah's shout, chaos. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 15x3She goes for him11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the execution platform, chaos.
Shot/lensplano entero (steadicam) running against the flow → plano detalle (whip-pan) palm bursts the platform base, deflects the light-strike → plano medio (handheld) hauling Vosk clear → primer plano of Vosk stunned.
Camerafast steadicam and whips, impact frames.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightchaos, sparks; the deflected light-blast flaring.
Action@StellaPeloCorto sprints toward the platform against the escaping current. Her palm blasts the platform's base and deflects the executioner's light-strike at the instant it fires. She hauls @Vosk out of the blade of light. He stares, dazed, neck still marked, uncomprehending.
Dialogue@Vosk: "…I handed you over. I sold you. Why—?"
Moodgrace over vengeance.
AudioSFX only — crashing platform, deflected blast, his stunned breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 15x4"Because I'm not you"12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the platform, the station burning behind.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano of Stella → plano medio (handheld) shove toward the exit → primer plano of Vosk changed.
Camerastatic on her line, handheld on the shove, then hold on Vosk. Let the line land.
Lightfirelight from the burning station.
Action@StellaPeloCorto looks at him without rancor, letting the line land: "Because I'm not you." She shoves him toward the exit. Hold on the thug — he looks at her differently, something breaking and re-forming in him (held silence).
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "Because I'm not you."
Moodgrace, a turning point.
AudioSFX only — burning station, a shove, his ragged breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @FosaApuestas → @NaveEsclavista/ship interior — match materials and colors; the station burning behind, then the quiet of a ship, smoke settling past the viewports.
Shot/lensgran plano general (crane) of the group escaping → plano general (static) inside the ship, later.
Cameracrane with the escape, then a still held wide. From action to quiet.
Lightfirelight, then cool ship interior; smoke settling in the windows.
Actionthey all escape together — @StellaPeloCorto, @Noah, @Brog, @Nima, @Vosk — as the station burns behind them. Cut to later, aboard the ship: stillness after the fire, smoke settling outside the viewports (contemplative hold).
Moodrelief, comedown.
AudioSFX only — fire, running, then quiet hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the quiet ship interior after the escape.
Shot/lensplano medio of @Theron observing → plano medio of @Noah bandaging a wound, watching Stella.
Camerastatic holds, unspoken. 間/ma.
Lightcool, low ship light.
Action@Theron watches @StellaPeloCorto from a distance — for the first time he doesn't look at her like bait; something changed for the hunter (held silence). @Noah, binding a wound, can't take his eyes off her.
Moodearned respect, unspoken.
AudioSFX only — a low ship hum, cloth tearing. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

16 — ESCENA: Montaje años · vínculos / idioma / traje / domar el Orbe · *(clips 16x1–16x8)* 8 clips

CLIP 16x1Comet planet12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; a strange beautiful world under a sky streaked with slow comets, soft grass, drifting light, cosmic silence.
Shot/lenstransición (fade to comet sky) → gran plano general (paneo) under the comets.
Camerabrief fade, then a slow lyrical pan across the comet sky. Peaceful, let it breathe.
Lightsoft comet-glow, warm.
Actiona fade into the comet planet — the whole sky crossed by slow trails of light, cosmic silence (contemplative hold). Slow pan drinks in the gentle alien world.
Moodtender respite.
AudioSFX only — soft wind, distant comet hiss. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x2Two silhouettes13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; soft grass under the comet sky, warm drifting light.
Shot/lensplano detalle (tilt) of a comet fading past the horizon → plano general of @Brog and @StellaPeloCorto seated, backs to us.
Cameraslow tilt, then a still held wide. 間/ma.
Lightsoft comet-glow.
Actiona distant comet leaves its trail and dies behind the horizon — time passing (contemplative). @Brog and @StellaPeloCorto sit with their backs to us, facing the comet sky, two still silhouettes. Hold.
Moodquiet, kinship.
AudioSFX only — soft wind, a low comet hiss. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x3Brog's dead language14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; by a comet-lit fire, firelight on stone and skin.
Shot/lensplano medio of @Brog speaking → primer plano of Stella repeating → primer plano of Brog's faint smile.
Cameraslow, warm, static. Intimate.
Lightfirelight on stone and skin.
Action@Brog utters a guttural word of his dead language — deep, ancient. @StellaPeloCorto repeats it, clumsy at first, then cleaner. @Brog nods slowly — the faint shift that is a mountain's smile (held silence).
Dialogue@Brog: "(Brog's tongue) …krun-tha." — @StellaPeloCorto: "…krun-tha."
Moodquiet kinship.
AudioSFX only — fire crackle, low guttural words. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x4The same sign / into the workshop14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the fire, then @Nima's open-air workbench. Props: @TrajeNuevo.
Shot/lensplano detalle of Brog's stone hand and Stella's hand tracing the same sign → transición (match cut to weld-sparks) → plano general (crane) of the workshop, the new suit hung.
Cameraheld detail, then a match cut from comet-sky to weld-sparks, then a slow crane. Let it breathe.
Lightcomet-glow, match-cutting to warm weld-glow.
Action@Brog's stone hand and @StellaPeloCorto's hand draw the same sign in the comet-lit air (contemplative). Match cut from comet sky to the weld-sparks of @Nima's workshop. Crane across the shop: the @TrajeNuevo hangs — light, custom-made; @Nima works with all four hands.
Moodkinship, craft.
AudioSFX only — fire crackle, then welding, tools, a soft hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x5"This one's for who's going back into the palace"14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; @Nima's workbench. Props: @TrajeNuevo.
Shot/lensplano detalle of a new wrist monitor (like the "MAX" one) blinking → plano medio of @Nima fitting a plate to Stella's shoulder → primer plano as Nima meets her eyes.
Cameraheld detail, then static two-shot, then reverse. Warm, deliberate.
Lightwarm work-glow.
Actioninsert of a new wrist monitor, identical to the one that read "MAX" that day, the screen flickering (contemplative). @Nima fits a plate to @StellaPeloCorto's shoulder, eyes on her work. Then she looks the girl in the eye.
Dialogue@Nima: "Your old suit was a child's." — @Nima: "This one's for whoever's going back into that palace."
Moodforging a warrior.
AudioSFX only — rivets, tools, a soft hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x6Orb training (unstable)15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; a training area, panels and gear around. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Stella landing on "palace" → transición (match cut wrist "MAX" → her palm charging the Orb) → plano entero (handheld) a discharge throws her down and blows a panel → plano detalle of falling sparks.
Camerastatic on her, a match cut, then handheld kicked by the discharge, held on the aftermath.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightwild flares of luzagua light, then smoke and sparks.
Action@StellaPeloCorto lets the word "palace" land, a muscle in her jaw (held silence). Match cut from the "MAX" wrist to her palm charging the @Orbe in a training room. The @Orbe fights her: a discharge throws her off her feet and blows a panel apart. Sparks fall, the wrecked panel smoking — the hangover of the failure settling.
Moodthe grind of mastery.
AudioSFX only — a building surge, a blast, her fall, hissing sparks. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 16x7She channels it (the river)15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the training area. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Stella rising, palm burned → plano medio (dolly-in) another attempt, controlled light → plano detalle of a clean stable ribbon.
Camerastatic, then a slow dolly-in steadying with her; held on the clean light. Awe.
Lighta clean ribbon of luzagua light.
Action@StellaPeloCorto on the ground, breathing hard, palm burned — she gets up (held silence). Another attempt: light flows from her palm, controlled now, like a river learning to run. Detail: the luzagua flows in a steady, clean thread — it finally obeys.
Moodhard-won calm, mastery.
AudioSFX only — her breath, then a smooth flowing hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @PlanetaCometas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the comet sky, drifting light. Props: @TrajeNuevo, @Orbe.
Shot/lensplano general (crane) of Stella standing in her own palm-light → gran plano general (paneo) closing pillow of the comet sky.
Cameraslow crane, then a lyrical closing pan. Let it breathe.
Lightthe light of her own palm; then comet-glow rimming everything.
Action@StellaPeloCorto stands in the light of her own palm — no longer a survivor but a weapon that chose its cause (held silence). Closing pillow: the comet sky again, more trails than before — years have passed.
Moodresolve.
AudioSFX only — a low steady hum, wind, comet hiss. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

17 — ESCENA: El puente · Theron pide la mano y el Orbe / la sospecha · *(clips 17x1–17x6)* 6 clips

Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim bridge of the nodriza at night, fixed stars beyond a great viewport, cold metal. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensplano general of the bridge, Theron and Stella alone → plano medio (Theron gestures) → primer plano of Stella hesitating.
Camerastatic wide, then reverses. Held, charged.
Lightstarlight through the viewport, cold cast on both.
Actionthe bridge at night, fixed stars behind the glass; @Theron and @StellaPeloCorto alone (contemplative). @Theron asks for something with a gesture. She hesitates a beat, reading him.
Dialogue@Theron: "Show me the hand. And the Orb."
Moodcharged trust.
AudioSFX only — a low ship hum, quiet. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 17x2The exposed Orb14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the night bridge, starlit. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensinserto of her opening palm, the Orb bare → plano detalle (dolly-in) his hand nearing hers → primerísimo primer plano of Stella holding her breath.
Cameraheld insert, slow dolly-in on his approaching hand, static on her. Tense.
Lightthe @Orbe pulsing, exposed and vulnerable; cold around it.
Actionshe opens her palm — the @Orbe beats beneath the skin, exposed and vulnerable (held silence). @Theron's hand drifts toward hers like a man about to tear something out. @StellaPeloCorto holds her breath without pulling away — trusting and not trusting at once.
Mooddread, tension.
AudioSFX only — a held breath, low hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 17x3"More useful breathing"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the night bridge. Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensplano detalle of his hand stopping, reading the Orb woven into her veins → plano medio (Theron withdraws, half to himself) → primer plano as he looks at her.
Cameraheld detail, static reverses. Cold restraint.
LightOrb-glow, his eyes calculating.
Action@Theron's hand stops — he reads how the @Orbe is tangled into every vein of her (held silence). He pulls back, speaking almost to himself, then looks at her.
Dialogue@Theron: "No. Forcing it out would kill you… and maybe whoever tries." — @Theron: "You're still more useful breathing."
Moodcold restraint.
AudioSFX only — a held breath, low hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 17x4The immortal King15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the night bridge, starlit.
Shot/lensplano medio of Stella pocketing her hand, dry → primer plano (dolly-in) as she lowers her voice → primer plano, the bait of suspicion.
Camerastatic, then a slow dolly-in as she shifts the subject. Quiet, probing.
Lightstarlight, cold cast.
Action@StellaPeloCorto tucks her hand away, dry. Then, lowering her voice, she turns to what burns her — planting the suspicion, a beat between each line.
Dialogue@StellaPeloCorto: "What a comfort." — @StellaPeloCorto: "Theron. In my world they say things about the King. That he's immortal. That he never aged." — @StellaPeloCorto: "That he arrived hundreds of years ago, out of nowhere."
Mooda spark of suspicion.
AudioSFX only — a low hum, her voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 17x5Something kindles in Theron12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the night bridge.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano (dolly-in) as Theron goes very still → plano medio as he closes the subject.
Cameraslow dolly-in, then static. Held, brooding.
Lightcold, his face half-lit, a pinlight in his eye.
Action@Theron goes utterly still — something kindles behind his eyes: this sounds like his prey (held silence). He closes the subject, controlled.
Dialogue@Theron: "Kings always say they're eternal. Sleep."
Moodbrooding, ancient.
AudioSFX only — a deep ship hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 17x6Theron alone with the void15s

Camerastatic holds. 間/ma, let it breathe.
Lighta single cold source; the infinite dark beyond.

Moodbrooding, ancient.
AudioSFX only — a deep ship hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

18 — ESCENA: El camarote / la foto / la familia viva · *(clips 18x1–18x6)* 6 clips

Lightdim; the @Proyector about to bloom.

Dialogue@Theron: "I don't care about your planet. But a good hunter always looks before he discards." — @Theron: "You look too."

Moodgrief, uncanny.
AudioSFX only — projector hum, a faint mine drone. No music.

19 — ESCENA: [AÑO 14] Las minas de niebla / Naio / Vera se decide · *(clips 19x1–19x7)* 7 clips

CLIP 19x1Erdia · Year 14 · fog mines12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @MinasNiebla — match its architecture, materials, colors; fog-drowned mines, columns of shackled slaves, dim lamps in the murk, grey vapor. (Title beat ERDIA · AÑO 14 as a hold on black.)
Shot/lenstransición on black → gran plano general (paneo) over the misty mines.
Camerahold on black, then a slow drift/pan through the fog. Contemplative.
Lightcold, foggy, lamp-glow.

Cameraheld detail, then a slow steadicam through the columns. Searching.
Lightcold, foggy, lamp-glow.
Actionfog curls over the mud; a chain hangs still, dripping (contemplative). @VeraEncapuchada slips between the slaves, searching face after face (held silence).
Moodgrim, searching.

CLIP 19x3She finds Naio15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @MinasNiebla — match its architecture, materials, colors; the misty mines, a single lamp between them.
Shot/lensprimer plano as she stops on a face — @NaioEsclavo → plano detalle as she lowers her hood just enough → primerísimo primer plano (dolly-in) of Naio recognizing her.
Camerastatic, held detail, slow dolly-in. Intimate, trembling.
Lighta single lamp between them.
Action@VeraEncapuchada finds a face and stops: @NaioEsclavo — old, broken, almost unrecognizable (held silence). She lowers her hood just enough for him to see her. @NaioEsclavo recognizes her and can't believe it, breathless.
Dialogue@NaioEsclavo: "…Vera? No. No, you died. I saw—"
Mooddisbelief, reunion.
AudioSFX only — chains, his shaking breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 19x4"She's not herself anymore"11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @MinasNiebla — match its architecture, materials, colors; the mines, lamp-glow.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Vera, urgent, low-voiced → primer plano as her voice breaks.
Camerastatic reverses, intimate.
Lightlamp-glow on grey-blue eyes.
Action@VeraEncapuchada, urgent and low, tells him their daughter lives; then her voice breaks.
Dialogue@VeraEncapuchada: "She's alive, Naio. Selka's alive." — @VeraEncapuchada: "But she's not… not her anymore. They put something else inside her."
Mooddread, love.
AudioSFX only — low voices, chains. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 19x5"Don't go, it's a trap"12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @MinasNiebla — match its architecture, materials, colors; the mines, lamp-glow.
Shot/lensprimer plano of Naio's plea → plano medio as Vera takes his face, decided.
Camerastatic, intimate. Steady.
Lightlamp-glow.
Action@NaioEsclavo, terrified for her, holds her with his eyes and begs. @VeraEncapuchada takes his face in both hands, decided.
Dialogue@NaioEsclavo: "Don't go. If she's with him, it's a trap. I beg you." — @VeraEncapuchada: "I'll come back for you. I swear. But first I go for my daughter."
Mooddread, resolve, love.
AudioSFX only — low voices, chains. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

20 — ESCENA: Aposentos de la General / la muerte de Vera (el engaño) · *(clips 20x1–20x17)* 17 clips

CLIP 20x1The General's quarters15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the General's cold, perfect palatial quarters in bluish gloom, a single light-candle, austere — a child raised into a weapon. (Title beat ERDIA · AÑO 14 — APOSENTOS DE LA GENERAL as a hold on black.)
Shot/lenstransición on black → plano general of the cold quarters → plano medio of the door: @Korin and @Lessa covering, @Marek walking Vera to the threshold.
Camerahold on black, then static holds. Quiet dread, let it breathe.
Lightbluish gloom, a single light-candle.
Actionhold on black (title beat). Then the cold palatial quarters, dim, one light-candle, silence (contemplative). At the door, @Korin and @Lessa cover the hall; @Marek walks @VeraEncapuchada to the threshold.

CLIP 20x2"Bring her back"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters, the threshold.
Shot/lensprimer plano of @Marek, grave, gripping her shoulder → primer plano, a loaded beat → plano medio as Vera crosses the threshold alone.
Camerastatic reverses, then hold on Vera stepping in. Quiet.
Lightcold, austere.
Action@Marek, grave, grips @VeraEncapuchada's shoulder and tells her to run if it goes wrong. A loaded beat: "Bring her back." @VeraEncapuchada nods, breathes deep, and crosses the threshold alone.
Dialogue@Marek: "I'll watch here. If it goes wrong, run. Don't look back." — @Marek: "Bring her back."
Moodquiet dread.
AudioSFX only — a low breath, soft steps, distant patrol. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Shot/lensplano detalle of the door closing behind her, the latch clicking → plano entero of @SelkaGeneral, back turned at the window.
Cameraheld detail, then static wide. 間/ma.
Lightcold, a single source at the window.
Actionthe door closes slowly behind @VeraEncapuchada — the latch clicks in the silence (contemplative). Inside, back turned, stands @SelkaGeneral the General — young, white-clad, immaculate, motionless at the window (held silence).
Moodice, foreboding.
AudioSFX only — a soft latch click, low room tone. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 20x4"A resistance rat" / "I came for you"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters, both lit by the single candle.
Shot/lensplano medio of @SelkaGeneral, back turned, cold → primer plano of Vera lowering her hood → plano medio as Selka begins to turn.
Camerastatic reverses, then a slow held turn. Ice cracking underneath.
Lightcold; grey-blue eyes and the scar over Selka's left eye catching the candle.
Action@SelkaGeneral, without turning, cold. @VeraEncapuchada lowers her hood — her bare face trembling with restraint. @SelkaGeneral begins to turn toward the voice, slowly.
Dialogue@SelkaGeneral: "I know what you are. A resistance rat. Come to kill me in my sleep?" — @VeraEncapuchada: "I came for you."
Moodice, buried recognition.
AudioSFX only — a low room tone, a soft breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 20x5"Traitor" / she attacks13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano (dolly-in) of Selka seeing Vera's face → primerísimo primer plano as training crushes the tremor → plano entero (handheld) as she lunges.
Cameraslow dolly-in, static, then a sharp cut into handheld on the attack.
Motion (on the lunge)very high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold; both faces lit, then blade-light.
Action@SelkaGeneral sees @VeraEncapuchada's face — something deep in her trembles for a microsecond (held silence). Then the conditioning crushes it; her face shuts like a door: "Traitor." She lunges into a fast, surgical attack.
Dialogue@SelkaGeneral: "Traitor."
Moodburied recognition snapping shut.
AudioSFX only — a breath, a blade unsheathing, the first strike. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 20x6The non-fight10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters, blade-light streaks.
Shot/lensplano medio (handheld) Vera dodging, blocking, giving ground → plano detalle (whip-pan) blade grazing past her face → primer plano (handheld) Vera pleading between blows.
Cameraanguished handheld, whip-pans — but she never strikes back.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold, blade-light streaks.
Action@VeraEncapuchada dodges, blocks, retreats — never counters; she cannot wound her daughter. @SelkaGeneral's blade passes a hair from Vera's face; Vera only deflects the arm. Between strikes, @VeraEncapuchada pleads.
Dialogue@VeraEncapuchada: "I won't hurt you. I can't. Look at me. Look at me."
Mooda heartbreaking non-fight.
AudioSFX only — blade clashes on guard, ragged breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano of Selka's arm shaking → plano detalle of the blade lowering.
Cameraslow push on her cracking face, then held detail. 間/ma.
Lightcold, softening.
Actionfaced with someone who refuses to wound her, @SelkaGeneral falters — her arm trembles, she disarms (held silence). The blade lowers slowly; something in her surrenders without understanding why. Hold.
Moodthe crack opening.
AudioSFX only — a trembling breath, the blade lowering. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 20x8The embrace13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters, a fragile warmth.
Shot/lensplano medio (dolly-in) as Vera folds her in → primer plano of Vera at Selka's ear, weeping.
Cameraslow tender dolly-in, then static. Dread beneath the tenderness.
Lightcold with a fragile warmth.
Action@VeraEncapuchada steps in and wraps @SelkaGeneral in an embrace, holding her the way mothers do (held silence). At Selka's ear, weeping.
Dialogue@VeraEncapuchada: "Let's go home. You, me, and your father. Let's start over. Let's forget all of this."
Moodfalse peace.
AudioSFX only — a soft breath, a held moment. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 20x9Stolen peace / the hidden blade13s

Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters. Death by light — no blood.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano of Selka's eyes closing in the embrace → plano detalle of her hand sliding a hidden light-blade to Vera's side → plano detalle as it drives in, a tiny flare of light passing through.
Cameraheld on her face, then two tight detail inserts. A single cruel beat.
Lightcold; a minimal flare of light at the strike — no blood, the light passes through her.
Actionin the embrace @SelkaGeneral closes her eyes — a stolen instant of peace (held silence). Beneath the embrace her hand slides a hidden light-blade toward @VeraEncapuchada's side. The blade drives into Vera's side — a minimal flare of light, no blood, the light passing through her.
Mooddevastation.
AudioSFX only — a soft light-strike, a caught breath. No music.

Lightcold; Vera's warm glow beginning to gutter.

CLIP 20x11"Selka. Why."13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @AposentosGeneral — match its architecture, materials, colors; the cold quarters, faces close.
Shot/lensprimerísimo primer plano (dolly-in) of dying Vera → primer plano of Selka, a cracking void.
Cameraslow dolly-in on Vera, then static on Selka. Let each word land. 間/ma.
Lightcold; Vera's vital glow dimming to grey.
Action@VeraEncapuchada, a thread of voice, broken and betrayed, letting each word land, her hand on her daughter's face. @SelkaGeneral does not answer — her face a void beginning to crack. Devastating silence.
Dialogue@VeraEncapuchada (dying, reaching for Selka's face, betrayed and breaking): "…Selka. Why."
Mooda mother dying on her daughter's face.
AudioSFX only — a fading breath, a held silence. No music.

Camerastatic holds, withholding the words. Intimate, cruel. 間/ma.
Lightcold; a body's warmth beginning to fade.
Action@SelkaGeneral holds @VeraEncapuchada against her; the embrace becomes something else — she whispers something at her ear we do NOT hear (held silence). From the ajar door, @Korin and @Lessa see it all: the General embracing her mother, and the blade. @Marek arrives a second too late, face wrenched with horror.
Moodthe lie being sealed.
AudioSFX only — a whisper too low to parse, a gasp at the door. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Dialogue@Korin: "…She killed her. Her own daughter killed her."

Action@SelkaGeneral stands over her mother's body, the blade dripping light, her whole body shaking (held silence). Without meaning to, without understanding, she begins to hum a lullaby she doesn't remember learning.
Dialogue@SelkaGeneral (humming, broken): "mmm… mm-mmm…"
Moodthe seed of the climax.

ACTO 3 · SEC 21-29 · el regreso · 71 clips

21 — ESCENA: [AÑO 20] El regreso · *(clips 21x1–21x10)* 10 clips

CLIP 21x1Grey dawn over broken Erdia14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the once-golden city now grey and cracked in two by fog, ash drifting in the still air, towering imperial murals of the King looming over rubble where gardens used to be; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Shot/lensgrand establishing wide over the ruined city, then a detail insert on a wall.
Cameraslow mournful crane over the grey; hold, let it breathe; then settle to a fixed frame on the mural detail.
Lightcold grey dawn, smoke-filtered, the old gold long dead.
Actionthe camera glides over @ErdiaRuinas at grey dawn — the golden city broken in two by fog, ash hanging motionless in the quiet air (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma). It settles on a peeling mural of the King; below it, scrawled in bitter hate, a single crossed-out name: STELLA.
Moodruin, dread, the weight of twenty years.
AudioSFX only — wind, distant patrols, a sick low hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark. (Only the in-world defaced name on the wall.)
CLIP 21x2Dead luzagua / the ship lands12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; a scrap-strewn landing among rubble, a dull thread of opaque luzagua running nearly dry between the debris; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Shot/lenswide of the dead water-light thread, then wide of a small ship descending and setting down.
Cameraheld fixed on the dying luzagua (let it breathe); then a slow travelling as the ship descends, dust rising and settling.
Lightflat grey daylight, the luzagua without shine.
Actiona thread of opaque luzagua runs between the scrap, almost dry, all its glow gone (hold, held silence). Then a small ship descends between the debris and sets down; dust lifts around it and settles again.
Moodfaded life, quiet arrival.
AudioSFX only — wind, then landing thrusters, settling dust. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 21x3They step out / Stella's face11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the scrap-strewn landing in the ruined city; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Brog, @Nima, @Noah, @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensfull shot of the hatch opening and the team stepping out, then a steadicam close-up of Stella's face under the hood.
Camerafixed on the hatch as they descend; then a slow steadicam push in on @StellaTeñida.
Lightgrey daylight, soft on her face.
Actionthe hatch opens and @Brog, @Nima, @Noah and a hooded young woman with dark-dyed hair — @StellaTeñida, 19 — step out. The camera drifts to her face under the hood as her grey-blue eyes travel over her own destroyed world in silence (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Moodreturn, quiet grief.
AudioSFX only — the hatch, boots on scrap, wind, her held breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 21x4Through the hatred / "you still came back"13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; a grey ruined market street, hollow-faced people; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @Noah.
Shot/lensmedium tracking of Stella through the crowd, detail insert of an old man spitting, then a close two-shot with Noah.
Camerasteadicam through hostile stares; fixed insert on the spit hitting the dust; fixed two-shot as Noah leans in.
Lightgrey, hard faces.
Action@StellaTeñida moves through the crowd under the hatred the King taught them, sunken faces watching her. An old man spits into the dust at the sound of her name in another conversation. @Noah walks close, lowers his voice, glances sideways at her.
DialogueNoah: "A whole planet hates you. And you still came back."
Moodresolve against a hostile world.
AudioSFX only — hostile murmurs, a spit, wind. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 21x5"That's why I came back" / surrounded12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the grey ruined street; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @Korin, resistance fighters.
Shot/lensclose-up on Stella holding her gaze, close-up as she answers low, then a sudden wide as the resistance surrounds them.
Camerafixed on her face (held silence, 間/ma); fixed as she speaks; then a fast handheld snap as the group closes in.
Lightgrey; light-weapons casting hard glow.
Action@StellaTeñida holds her gaze on the broken city, not answering yet, the weight of being home on her face (held silence). Then, eyes on the ruins, she answers low. Suddenly a resistance group surrounds them, light-weapons raised — at the front, old and tired, @Korin.
DialogueStella: "That's why I came back."
Moodquiet resolve breaking into a standoff.
AudioSFX only — her low voice, weapons priming, a barked order. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.

Camerafixed on the face-off; slow dolly in on @Korin's finger tightening on the energy trigger; hold extreme close-up on her eyes.
Lightgrey, a light-weapon's cold glow on her face.
Action@Korin aims at @StellaTeñida; slowly she lowers her hood, revealing the dark-dyed hair. @Korin studies her face without knowing her, his finger over the energy trigger (held silence). The camera pushes to an extreme close-up of her grey-blue eyes under the dark hair — the one feature that betrays her (hold, 間/ma).
Mooda breath from disaster.
AudioSFX only — tense quiet, a weapon's hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 21x7Korin recognizes her14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the grey ruined street; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Korin, @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensclose-up on Korin as recognition breaks him, medium as he lowers the weapon, close-up on Stella holding silent.
Camerafixed on his cracking face; fixed as his weapon drops; hold on Stella (let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightgrey, a softening on his weathered face.
Actionsomething breaks in @Korin's face — he recognizes her, his voice trembling. He lowers the weapon, shaking; the others hesitate. @StellaTeñida holds his gaze in silence, swallowing twenty years (held silence).
DialogueKorin: "…Stella? I knew you when you were small — always at your mother's side." — Korin: "It's you. You came back."
Moodreunion, disbelief.
AudioSFX only — his breaking voice, lowered weapons. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

ActionErdia hangs in orbit, golden and diseased, turning slowly in the black (hold, 間/ma). On the nodriza bridge @Vosk watches the screen where Erdia churns and clenches his fists.

Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the nodriza bridge; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Camerafixed shot/reverse between them; hold on Vosk's tense jaw before he answers (間/ma).

Action@Vosk turns to @Theron, decided. @Theron stays still, eyes never leaving the screen. @Vosk holds the silence, jaw tight, before he answers (held silence).
DialogueVosk: "Let me go down. She's alone down there." — Theron: "Not our war."
Moodloyalty pushing against detachment.
AudioSFX only — bridge hum, their low voices. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the nodriza bridge; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Vosk, @Theron.
Shot/lensclose-up on Vosk, low and firm, then medium on Theron watching, saying nothing.
Camerafixed close-up on @Vosk; fixed medium on @Theron holding his long look (let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightcold, planet-glow on their faces.
Action@Vosk speaks, low and steady. @Theron looks at him for a long moment — he doesn't say yes, but he doesn't stop him either, his own ancient suspicion pulling him toward the surface (held silence).
DialogueVosk: "It became mine the day she pulled me out of that pit."
Moodloyalty earned, the hunter circling.
AudioSFX only — his low voice, deep bridge hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Camerafixed wide on the refuge (hold, let it breathe); then steadicam following them toward the corner.
Lightdim, a single lamp, cold shafts of light.
Actionthe dim refuge in half-light — dripping, hung cloth, cold light through scaffolding (hold, 間/ma). @Korin leads @StellaTeñida toward a newly-freed old slave, hunched in a corner — @NaioRescatado.
Mooddread, fragile hope.

Moodaching recognition.
AudioSFX only — dripping, her breath catching. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim resistance refuge; lush, detailed, painterly background.
