Shot/lensextreme close-up on Stella barely speaking, close-up on Naio searching for a face he can't find, detail on their joined hands with the Key glowing.
Camerafixed extreme close-up as she whispers; fixed on his empty searching eyes; slow push to their hands, the @LlaveDeLuz pulsing under her skin (hold, 間/ma).
Lightlamp-glow; the sigil's warm pulse between their hands.
Action@StellaTeñida says it, barely audible. @NaioRescatado lifts his head, searching for a face he cannot place, his eyes empty (held silence). Then his hands find her hand and feel, beneath the skin, the @LlaveDeLuz — the @Orbe still pulsing, still safe (hold, let it breathe).
DialogueStella: "Dad."
Moodthe truth landing.
AudioSFX only — her soft voice, a soft pulse, his breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 22x4His eye floods / "you kept it safe"11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim resistance refuge; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@NaioRescatado, @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensextreme close-up on Naio's good eye flooding, close-up as his voice breaks with wonder.
Camerahold on his welling eye (let it breathe, 間/ma); fixed as he speaks.
Lightlamp-glow on his tears.
Action@NaioRescatado's good eye floods with tears as he feels the pulse (held silence). His voice breaks with astonishment as twenty years collapse into a single moment.
DialogueNaio: "You came back. Twenty years. I told you never to let him have it, and… look at you. You kept it safe. Your whole life."
Moodoverwhelming tenderness.
AudioSFX only — his weeping voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the dim resistance refuge; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @NaioRescatado.

Camerafixed on Stella as she swears; hold on Naio's face as he keeps his silence (間/ma).
Lightlamp-glow.
Action@StellaTeñida, firm despite her tears, swears to get them out. @NaioRescatado listens; the weight of what the resistance believes about Vera crosses his face — but he says nothing, letting her keep her hope (held silence).
DialogueStella: "Mom's alive, Dad. I saw her. I'll get you both out of here. Selka too. I promise."
Moodhope built on a hidden grief.
AudioSFX only — her voice, his silence, dripping. No music.

23 — ESCENA: El asalto / la escalada · *(clips 23x1–23x3)* · **SET-PIECE A6** 3 clips

CLIP 23x1The palace / war erupts15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the fog-streets erupting into war beneath the looming palace-dome; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Brog, @Nima, @Noah, @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), resistance, imperial robots.
Shot/lensgrand crane wide of the dome over the city and the resistance tide, then medium/detail action on Brog, Nima and Noah.
Cameraslow mournful crane over the palace-dome above the grey tide (hold); then it cuts fast and kinetic — handheld and whip-pans through the fighting.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightgrey fog laced with cold energy-light (no fire).
Actionthe palace-dome rises over the fog-city as the resistance advances like a grey tide (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma). Then war detonates in the streets — light against light, no fire — bodies and robots colliding. @Brog punches a breach through a wall, blocks bursting; @Nima's four arms gut an imperial robot in cold sparks; @Noah deflects an energy discharge and covers @StellaTeñida's flank.
Moodcontemplation snapping into chaos and uprising.
AudioSFX only — wind, then energy clashes, shouts, collapsing stone, servos. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 23x2Naio saved / Stella breaks off and climbs12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @ErdiaRuinas — match its architecture, materials, colors; the war-torn streets and the sheer palace façade above; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@NaioRescatado, @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), resistance.
Shot/lenswide of a commando pulling slaves from a cage, close-up on Stella deciding, low-angle crane of her climbing, detail on her fingers gripping cold metal.
Camerahandheld on the rescue; brief fixed close-up on Stella's decision (held breath); then a vertiginous crane up as she scales; fixed detail on her grip, the tiny city far below.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightgrey, energy-fire strobing the fog.
Actiona resistance commando tears a group of slaves from a cage — @NaioRescatado among them, pulled to safety. @StellaTeñida looks up at the highest dome and decides to break her recon mission (held silence). She scales the palace alone through bursts of light, climbing toward the throne hall; her fingers grip a cold metal ledge, the city tiny far below.
Moodrescue under fire, explosive drive.
AudioSFX only — running, shouts, energy fire, wind. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 23x3The glass dome / the white figure / she shatters it14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; seen down through the glass dome, a vast cold throne hall, one white figure standing perfectly still at its center; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @SelkaGeneral (below, distant). Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lenswide of the dome and the waiting figure below, close-up dolly-in of Stella loading the Orb, detail as her fist meets the glass, low-angle as she falls through.
Camerafixed on the still figure through the glass (hold, 間/ma); slow dolly in on Stella breathing; fixed detail on the Orb-light bursting on the surface; handheld low-angle as the glass shatters and she drops.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold hall-light below; the @Orbe's flare, glass catching light in slow shards.
Action@StellaTeñida reaches the glass ceiling; far below at the center, a single white figure waits motionless (hold, let it breathe). She looks down through the glass, breathes, and charges the @Orbe in her palm. Her fist comes down; the Orb-light bursts across the surface — the glass shatters into a bright rain of shards and she falls toward the throne.
Moodfate closing, the plunge into the climax.
AudioSFX only — muffled battle, a held breath, a surge, glass shattering, rushing air. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Action@StellaTeñida lands among broken glass, rolls and rises. The shards settle onto the polished floor, the echo dying (hold, 間/ma). Facing her: @SelkaGeneral — the General, 21, white, scar over her left eye, without a gesture (held silence).

CLIP 24x3"I didn't come to fight" / she disarms Selka14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold hall, blade-light streaking on contact.
Action@StellaTeñida opens her hands, refusing the fight. @SelkaGeneral, believing nothing, lunges — the @HojaSelka arcing at Stella. @StellaTeñida blocks, deflects and dodges with impossible skill, faster; with a spin she disarms @SelkaGeneral and the blade flies, ringing across the floor.
DialogueStella: "I didn't come to fight you." — Selka: "Everyone says that before they die."
Moodthe duel exploding into motion.
AudioSFX only — a blade swing, blade clashes, fast footwork, a disarm. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x4She won't kill / "why did you kill our mother?"12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye). Props: @HojaSelka.
Shot/lensclose-up on Stella holding the kill and refusing, medium as she backs off searching Selka's eyes, extreme close-up on Selka recovering the blade.
Camerahold on Stella's restraint (held silence, 間/ma); handheld as she backs away asking; fixed extreme close-up on Selka, no blink.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold, blade-light.
Action@StellaTeñida has the killing blow and does not take it — she doesn't want to beat her, she wants to reach her (held silence). She backs off, dodging, searching her eyes. @SelkaGeneral, without a blink, recovers her @HojaSelka.
DialogueStella: "Why did you kill our mother?" — Selka: "I've executed hundreds. I don't recall one named 'mother'."
Moodrestraint as strength, a gut-wound.
AudioSFX only — fast footwork, her steady cold voice. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x5She's downed / the light-game gesture14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @Gix. Props: @Brazalete, @HojaSelka.
Shot/lensclose-up on the line landing on Stella, full shot as Selka sweeps her down, POV of the blade over her face, detail of a Gix spark in her cupped palm, medium as she lifts it to Selka's forehead.
Camerafixed on Stella struck by the words (held); handheld sweep as Selka downs her, impact frame; POV up at the blinding blade; then the chaos slows to a held breath — detail on the warm @Gix spark; fixed as she raises the hand.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold, blade blinding — then the one warm spark of @Gix cutting the hall.
Actionthe words hurt @StellaTeñida more than any blow; the line lands on her face (held silence). @SelkaGeneral seizes the low guard, sweeps her down and raises the blade; POV — the light-blade hangs blinding over Stella's face. By pure reflex her palm cups, and a spark of @Gix drops and dances in it (the chaos slows, held breath, 間/ma). She lifts the hand with the spark toward @SelkaGeneral's forehead — the gesture from the lab, the light game.
Moodbrutal, then the seed detonating.
AudioSFX only — a leg-sweep, a body-slam, a gasp, then a soft warm chime cutting the violence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x6Selka freezes / "why do I know that?"10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes).
Shot/lensclose-up on Selka frozen mid-strike, the blade trembling, dolly-in extreme close-up as a lost child surfaces.
Camerafixed on her frozen, shaking blade (hold, 間/ma); slow dolly in as her cold mask splits.
Lightthe warm spark reflected in her grey-blue eyes.
Action@SelkaGeneral freezes mid-strike, the blade shaking in the air — her body remembers the safety of that gesture before her mind can (held silence). Beneath the General, for an instant, a lost child surfaces, her grey-blue eyes welling.
DialogueSelka: "…Why… why do I know that?"
Moodthe crack opening, heartbreak.
AudioSFX only — a trembling breath, the spark's hum, her broken whisper. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x7A heartbeat from waking / she rips the Orb out14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye). Props: @Orbe, @LlaveDeLuz.
Shot/lensshot/reverse of the two still, foreheads close, the spark between them; close-up on Selka terrified; whip-pan detail as she grabs Stella's hand; extreme close-up as the Orb tears free in a blinding flare.
Camerafixed on the two still, spark floating between their faces (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma); fixed on Selka's flicker of panic; then fast — whip-pan as she seizes the hand, a blinding flare snap as the @Orbe rips out of Stella's palm.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe warm spark, cold around — then a blinding white flare as the Orb leaves her palm.
Actionthe two hold still, a single heartbeat from waking the sister, the @Gix spark floating between their faces (held silence, 間/ma). That nearness terrifies @SelkaGeneral more than any blade. Furious, she grabs @StellaTeñida's hand and attacks what confuses her — she rips the @Orbe out of Stella's flesh in a blinding white flare (only she can — shared blood).
Moodterror of feeling, catastrophe.
AudioSFX only — two held breaths, a tearing surge, a white-out crack. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x8Stella collapses / Gix into her heart12s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@StellaTeñida (dark-dyed hair, grey-blue eyes), @SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @Gix. Props: @Orbe, @Brazalete.
Shot/lensfull shot as Stella crumples into coma, detail as a spark leaves the bracelet and sinks into her chest, close-up on Selka holding the Orb, shaken.
Camerahandheld as Stella drops, eyes rolling white; fixed detail on the ember spark sinking into her heart (hold, 間/ma); fixed close-up on Selka breathing hard, not knowing what she did (held silence).
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightcold; the faint ember glow over Stella's heart.
Action@StellaTeñida collapses, eyes rolling white, falling into a coma — not death. A spark leaves the @Brazalete and sinks into her chest: @Gix embracing her heart from within (hold, let it breathe). @SelkaGeneral stands, the @Orbe in her hand, breathing hard, not knowing what she has just done (held silence).
Moodcatastrophe, hollow.
AudioSFX only — a body falling, a soft ember pulse, her ragged breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 24x9"Tell them. The traitor fell."10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @StellaTeñida (in coma).
Shot/lensmedium on Selka giving the order, voice not quite her own, detail on Stella's still body, breath barely moving her chest.
Camerafixed medium on Selka; fixed detail on Stella's motionless form (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightcold hall-light, the faint ember over Stella's chest.
Action@SelkaGeneral turns to the guards, her voice not quite steady, and gives the order. Then: @StellaTeñida's motionless body on the floor, her breath barely stirring her chest (held silence, 間/ma).
DialogueSelka: "Tell them. The traitor fell."
Moodhollow victory.
AudioSFX only — her shaking voice, a faint breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

25 — ESCENA: La nave despierta · *(clips 25x1–25x4)* 4 clips

CLIP 25x1She sets the Orb into the console14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the throne console at the heart of the vast cold hall; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye). Props: @Orbe.
Shot/lensfull steadicam as she walks to the console, dolly-in detail as she seats the Orb, close-up as she waits, holding her breath.
Camerasteadicam following her (held silence); slow dolly in on the Orb seating with a heartbeat; hold on her hopeful, brittle face (間/ma).
Lightcold hall; the @Orbe's glow on the console.
Action@SelkaGeneral walks to the throne console, the @Orbe in her hand — at last about to return the light, to be the hero she believes she is (held silence). She sets the @Orbe into its socket; it seats with a heartbeat. She waits for the light to come back, holding her breath (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Moodbrittle hope.
AudioSFX only — quiet steps, the Orb seating, a rising hum. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 25x2The light does not return / everything shakes10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the vast cold throne hall beginning to transform; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye).
Shot/lensgrand wide of the dead hall, detail of walls folding into plates, wide of floor becoming deck and the throne opening into a command bridge.
Camerafixed wide on the dead hall (hold, held silence); then it shakes — handheld as the walls fold and ancient engines wake below.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe expected glow failing; then cold ancient systems spreading light.
Actionnothing happens — the light does not return, the throne hall stays dead and cold (hold, 間/ma). Then everything shakes: the palace walls begin to fold like plates, the floor becomes deck, the throne opens into a command bridge, ancient engines waking deep below.
Mooddread erupting into wrongness.
AudioSFX only — a dying hum, silence, then groaning structure and waking machinery. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 25x3Spectacle: it was always a ship / Selka afraid11s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NavePalacio — match its architecture, materials, colors; the palace revealed as a colossal ship, every column a strut, every wall a bulkhead, whole structure igniting; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye). Props: @NavePalacio.
Shot/lensgrand crane wide of the entire structure lighting up, medium as Selka backs away, small against it.
Camerasweeping crane reveal of the scale (hold, let it breathe); then handheld as @SelkaGeneral backs away, afraid.
Lightcolossal ship-systems blazing to life, flooding the hall.
Actionwhat everyone believed a palace — what the people believed a meteorite — ignites whole: it was always a ship (hold, 間/ma). @SelkaGeneral backs away, small against the rising machinery, afraid for the first time in her life.
Moodawe, horror, the floor dropping out of reality.
AudioSFX only — titanic machinery, a deep wakening roar, her small gasp. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 25x4"The light was never yours"15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall, the throne in deep shadow; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @Vorthan (O.S., shadowed throne).
Shot/lensclose-up on Selka toward the throne, voice trembling, wide dolly-in on the shadowed throne, extreme close-up on the King's silhouette.
Camerafixed on Selka; slow dolly in on the shadowed throne as a many-voiced laugh answers; fixed extreme close-up on Vorthan's silhouette.
Lightcold, the throne in deeper shadow.
Action@SelkaGeneral, voice trembling, speaks toward the shadow of the throne. From the throne a laugh answers, made of a thousand voices at once (held silence). @Vorthan's silhouette, the multiple voice.
DialogueSelka: "Majesty… the Orb should bring the light. What is this? What's happening?" — Vorthan (O.S.): "The light was never theirs, little one. And it was never yours."
Moodterror dawning.
AudioSFX only — machinery, a laugh in many voices. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

26 — ESCENA: "Fui yo" (la revelación) 🔒 · *(clips 26x1–26x14)* 14 clips

CLIP 26x1Vorthan rises / becomes Vera / walks to Stella15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall in half-light; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Vorthan → @VeraEncapuchada (grey-blue eyes) (=Vorthan), @StellaTeñida (dying on the floor).
Shot/lensfull shot of Vorthan rising and his silhouette deforming, detail as the flesh folds and resolves into Vera, medium steadicam as "Vera" walks slowly toward Stella.
Camerafixed as he rises (held silence); fixed detail on the unnerving shift; slow steadicam following "Vera" toward the dying Stella (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightcold, the face resolving warm-familiar.
Action@Vorthan rises from the throne in the gloom, his silhouette beginning to deform (held silence). His flesh folds and recomposes, resolving into the shape of @VeraEncapuchada — the mother's face, grey-blue eyes. Wearing the mother's face, the thing walks slowly toward @StellaTeñida dying on the floor (hold, 間/ma).
Mooddread, the secret breaking.
AudioSFX only — a wet shifting sound, a thousand-voice hush, slow footsteps. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Camerafixed as "Vera" kneels, sweet and monstrous (held silence); hold extreme close-up on Stella's failing eyes, seeing no monster (let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightcold, a false warmth on the mother's face.
Actionwearing the mother's face, the thing kneels beside @StellaTeñida and strokes her dark-dyed hair — sweet and monstrous at once (held silence). @StellaTeñida half-opens her eyes one last time; she does not see the monster (hold, 間/ma).
Moodunbearable cruelty disguised as mercy.
AudioSFX only — a gentle false voice, Stella's failing breath. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Camerafixed blurred POV, soft (hold, let it breathe); hold extreme close-up on Stella's smile (間/ma); fixed on "Vera", poisoned tenderness.
Lightsoft, warm-false in her fading eyes.

DialogueStella: "Mom… you came." — "Vera": "I'm here, my love. Rest."
Moodthe cruelest tenderness.
AudioSFX only — a faint breath, a soft false voice. No music.

Lightcold, his eyes wrong.

Dialogue"Marek": "Did you never wonder how the King always knew where to strike the resistance?"
Moodbetrayal compounding.

Lightcold, his eyes wrong.
Action"Marek", the revelation dropping like a slab, explains. @SelkaGeneral takes the blow in silence, the moral ground disappearing beneath her feet (held silence, 間/ma). The form shrinks, growing small, shifting one last time.
Dialogue"Marek": "There was no resistance. Only me. Leading them all by the hand to the slaughter."
Moodtotal despair.
AudioSFX only — his warm-wrong voice, the shifting sound. No music.

Camerafixed medium on Selka and Stella; then a slow crane up and out — Selka tiny on the vast deck (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightcold, the faint ember on Stella's chest.
Action@SelkaGeneral looks at @StellaTeñida, coma-still on the floor, the cry splitting her. The camera cranes up and out: Selka on her knees beside her sister, alone on the immense deck, holding the void (hold, 間/ma).
DialogueSelka: "IT WAS OUR MOTHER."
Moodannihilation, held silence.
AudioSFX only — her gutted cry, then a vast quiet. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

27 — ESCENA: El Parásito / el brazo de Selka / la extracción · *(clips 27x1–27x6)* · **SET-PIECE A8** 6 clips

CLIP 27x1True form: the Parásito14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall / deck, the structure trembling; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Parasito (=Vorthan, true form).
Shot/lensfull shot as the child-flesh dissolves, grand crane wide as the colossal creature takes form filling the hall, extreme low-angle tilt up its mass to the ceiling.
Camerafixed as the disguise falls; slow crane wide unable to contain it (hold, let it breathe); extreme low-angle tilt up (間/ma).
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe @Parasito glowing with stolen luzagua light of a thousand worlds, vast and wrong.
Actionthe thing abandons all disguises, the child-flesh dissolving; it takes its true form — the @Parasito, a colossal ancient creature made of the stolen light of a thousand worlds, filling the hall (hold, 間/ma). Its mass rises to the ceiling: what left the heart of Erdia hollow.
Moodapocalyptic awe.
AudioSFX only — a titanic roar, groaning structure. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 27x2Selka charges / it severs her arm14s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall, the colossus filling it; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @Parasito. Props: @HojaSelka.
Shot/lensclose-up on Selka newly human, detail as she takes up her blade, full shot as she charges, wide as the blade barely scores the mass, whip-pan detail as a light-sweep severs her arm, full shot as she falls maimed but alive. Cauterized by light, no blood.
Camerafixed close-up on Selka's new certainty; fixed detail on the reigniting blade; handheld charge; whip-pan on the light-sweep severing her arm, impact frame; camera drops with her.
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lighther blade-light against the vast stolen-light glow; the wound cauterized to glowing edges, no blood.
Action@SelkaGeneral — newly broken, newly human — has one new certainty: her sister crossed a universe for her (held silence). She takes up her @HojaSelka, the blade reigniting, and hurls herself at the @Parasito to cover Stella's rescue. She is nowhere near its scale; the blade barely scores the mass. The @Parasito, almost without noticing, severs her arm with a sweep of light (cauterized, no blood). @SelkaGeneral falls, maimed but alive, rolling across the deck.
Mooddoomed courage, sacrifice.
AudioSFX only — her war-cry, colossal impacts, a searing strike, a hard fall. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 27x3Selka maimed / a bulkhead blows / Theron enters10s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall, smoke; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (maimed, grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @Theron. Cauterized by light, no blood.
Shot/lensclose-up on Selka's cauterized stump and shocked face, wide as an explosion buckles a bulkhead, full shot as Theron enters through the smoke, immense and still.
Camerafixed close-up on Selka, cauterized stump glowing, breath broken (held silence); handheld as the bulkhead buckles inward; fixed on @Theron entering, immense and still (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe wound sealed and glowing (no blood); the breach blast; the monster's glow.
Action@SelkaGeneral on the floor, the stump of her arm cauterized and smoking with light, her face pure shock, breath ragged (held silence). An explosion buckles the bulkhead inward. @Theron strides in through the smoke, immense, motionless (hold, 間/ma).
Moodsacrifice landing, the hunter's arrival.
AudioSFX only — her ragged breath, an explosion, buckling metal. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 27x4"There you are" / Brog and Nima enter13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall, the colossus filling it; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@Theron, @Parasito, @Brog, @Nima.
Shot/lensdolly-in close-up on Theron seeing his prey at last, extreme close-up as he speaks almost a prayer, wide as Brog and Nima pour through the breach.
Cameraslow dolly in on @Theron's face (held silence, 間/ma); fixed extreme close-up as he speaks low; handheld as @Brog and @Nima enter while Theron faces the monster.
Lightthe monster's glow on his face.
Action@Theron looks at the monster; for the first time in twenty thousand years he sees it with his own eyes — every lost trail finally has a face (held silence, 間/ma). He says it, low, almost a prayer. @Brog and @Nima charge in through the breach while @Theron faces the @Parasito.
DialogueTheron: "There you are."
Moodthe hunter's reckoning.
AudioSFX only — a low prayer of a voice, running, the roar. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.
CLIP 27x5They lift the sisters / "I've got them! MOVE!"13s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @SalaTrono — match its architecture, materials, colors; the transformed hall, the colossus filling it; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Shot/lensmedium steadicam as Brog lifts Stella and Nima carries Selka, medium as Vosk covers the door, medium as Nima shouts to Theron, full dolly-out as Theron retreats backward, eyes on the monster.
Camerasteadicam on the lifts; handheld on Vosk at the door; fixed as Nima shouts; dolly out with @Theron backing away (held gaze on the monster, 間/ma).
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightthe monster's glow behind them.
Action@Brog scoops the coma-still @StellaTeñida like a feather; @Nima carries the maimed @SelkaGeneral. @Vosk covers the door with his blade raised — he made it after all. @Nima screams to @Theron over the din. @Theron backs away from the @Parasito, never taking his eyes off it (held gaze).
DialogueNima: "I've got them! MOVE!"
Moodsurvival snatched from doom.
AudioSFX only — running, her shout, the roar. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

28 — ESCENA: El portal / la huida del monstruo · *(clips 28x1–28x6)* 6 clips

Characters—. Props: @NavePalacio, @Orbe.
Shot/lensgrand crane wide as the palace tears free of the city scattering debris, grand tilt as the mass rises and blots the grey sky.
Cameracrane up with the colossal ship, debris raining; then a slow awe-struck tilt up (hold, let it breathe).
Motionvery high motion strength, vertiginous and visceral, rapid handheld + whip-pans + impact frames + motion blur, hits land with weight, faces in sharp focus with raw expression.
Lightdust and ship-light against grey sky.
Actionthe @NavePalacio finishes tearing free of the city, scattering rubble, the @Orbe blazing in its core, and climbs into the sky. The mass rises over Erdia, impossibly vast, blotting out the grey sky (hold, 間/ma).
Moodcolossal departure, dread.
AudioSFX only — titanic engines, raining rubble, a deep ascending roar. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

Camerapush toward the opening portal (hold, let it breathe); fixed grand wide as the ship enters and is gone.
Lighta blinding tear of light in the grey sky.
Actiona portal opens in the sky — a slash of light toward the next world it will empty (hold, 間/ma). The @NavePalacio slides into the portal and vanishes; it pursues no one — it has what it came for.
Moodominous, vast.
AudioSFX only — a tearing-space roar. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no on-screen text, no watermark.

CLIP 29x11Selka hears the whisper / three figures around the tank15s
StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the darkened infirmary, the lit tank at its heart; lush, detailed, painterly background.
Characters@SelkaGeneral (maimed, grey-blue eyes, scar over her left eye), @StellaTeñida (coma), @NaioRescatado, @Theron, @Gix. Props: @TanqueSoporte.
Shot/lensclose-up on Selka, forehead on the glass, hearing the whisper, eyes closing on a thread of hope; wide dolly-out of the lit tank in the dark infirmary, three veiled figures around it.
Camerafixed close-up on Selka (held silence); slow dolly out to the lit tank and the three figures, the ember pulsing far (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma).
Lightthe lit @TanqueSoporte the only glow in the dark; the far ember.
Action@SelkaGeneral, forehead on the glass, hears the whisper, her eyes closing on a wisp of hope (held silence). The camera pulls back: the lit @TanqueSoporte in the dark infirmary, three veiled figures around it — @NaioRescatado, @Theron, @SelkaGeneral — the ember pulsing far (hold, 間/ma).
Mooddevastation with a thread of hope.
AudioSFX only — a breath, soft tank bubbling, a distant ember pulse. No music.

StyleSatoshi Kon–style anime, cinematic composition, cinematic mood, 2D hand-painted Ghibli touch, fluid motion, film-grade lighting, soft grain. 21:9, 15s.
Settingthe location shown in @NodrizaInterior — match its architecture, materials, colors; the darkened infirmary; lush, detailed, painterly background.

Shot/lensdetail insert on the ember, a last faint pulse held until the image dims, then cut to black with the title.
Cameramicro hold on the ember, one faint last pulse (hold, held silence, 間/ma), then to black.
Lightthe tiny ember glow, the last light in frame, then black.
Actioninside the tank the ember of @Gix gives one last faint pulse — faint, but it pulses — held until the image dims (hold, let it breathe, 間/ma); cut to black. Over the black, the title: EL NODO DE ERDIA.
Mooddevastation with a thread of hope.
AudioSFX only — one faint ember pulse, then silence. No music.
Negativeno blood, no gore, no guns, no firearms, no watermark. (Only the end title "EL NODO DE ERDIA".)
